why I support Josh Riley — and you should too!

| Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[**I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Upset the Setup and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66903661/417945971/-848686367?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230722_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NWE3NTIzLWVkMjgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_LGLvcDNKgPjg7tYi9GDnu9bRwl0K4zdiphjWQCJAiQ=)

Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District, a key district to taking back the House. Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them._**

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, NY-19 is considered a tossup and one of the most competitive in the nation.

[**So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Upset the Setup and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66903662/417945972/-848686367?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230722_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NWE3NTIzLWVkMjgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_LGLvcDNKgPjg7tYi9GDnu9bRwl0K4zdiphjWQCJAiQ=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66903663/417945973/-848686367?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=UTS_20230722_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NWE3NTIzLWVkMjgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_LGLvcDNKgPjg7tYi9GDnu9bRwl0K4zdiphjWQCJAiQ=)**

body:
As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall...

As I told Sean Hannity at my town hall...
| | Friend,
---
After I was unjustly indicted by Crooked Joe's corrupt DOJ in June as a completely innocent man, I sent you an email letting you know what these witch hunts are REALLY all about...
**_... FEAR. _**
The fear that if you stand in the way of the Left's Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for _LIFE_ for your beliefs.
The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their public enemy #1.
And the fear that if you vote for the ONLY candidate who will put you FIRST, then YOU could be their next target.
Just the other night at my town hall with Sean Hannity, he asked me how I remain "unbothered" despite the never-ending witch hunts.
But the truth is, they _do_ bother me - _not because I 'm worried about my own fate, **but because of what it means for YOU and the incredible sold-out audience of patriots at my town hall. **_
Make no mistake, the radical Democrats see the polls, they see we are CRUSHING not just our Republican primary opponents, but Biden as well by tremendous numbers.
And so they think that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts, indictments, and even arrests, that they will intimidate YOU out of casting a vote to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.
_But what these thugs will never understand is that our movement is nothing like the cowardly RINOs or the special interest sell-outs ... _
**... No, _OUR_ MAGA Movement is more than 74 MILLION freedom-loving patriots who REFUSE to even flinch in the face of tyranny! **
Which is why at this pivotal moment for our nation - and with a THIRD unjust indictment now looming - I ask that you help me PROVE just how UNBREAKABLE we truly are.

The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their public enemy #1. And the fear that if you vote for the ONLY candidate who will put you FIRST, then YOU could be their next target. Just the other night at my town hall with Sean Hannity, he asked me how I remain "unbothered" despite the never-ending witch hunts. But the truth is, they do bother me - not because I 'm worried about my own fate, but because of what it means for YOU and the incredible sold-out audience of patriots at my town hall. Make no mistake, the radical Democrats see the polls, they see we are CRUSHING not just our Republican primary opponents, but Biden as well by tremendous numbers. And so they think that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts, indictments, and even arrests, that they will intimidate YOU out of casting a vote to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. But what these thugs will never understand is that our movement is nothing like the cowardly RINOs or the special interest sell-outs ... ... No, OUR MAGA Movement is more than 74 MILLION freedom-loving patriots who REFUSE to even flinch in the face of tyranny! Which is why at this pivotal moment for our nation - and with a THIRD unjust indictment now looming - I ask that you help me PROVE just how UNBREAKABLE we truly are. | | - Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Mike Pence
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqsj3nrqa7i9r5mftl4th2e4ka2m7t0ugntfsf0o_rp22sh2s8i66p70chg66ob1c1h2bs)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1292pu5g2f7eut9403m3ar1ohjm12a7ljf38p70_rp22sh2s8i66p70chg66ob1c1h2bs)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh7vdofmueqcg4glm2cslq05sfs6rc72cf3krbn0_rp22sh2s8i66p70chg66ob1c1h2bs "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8fp4r5cqqbcqghqb32p69dpggi3le9hu4ufpdtg_rp22sh2s8i66p70chg66ob1c1h2bs)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znoqm1oot2jlddea997h12lj5c0b5geccorkj1f0_rp22sh2s8i66p70chg66ob1c1h2bs "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2eafrndmgaeqesg4eoqasfkc3j0e6qcd5igguqg_rp22sh2s8i66p70chg66ob1c1h2bs)
---

Mike Pence

name: Mike Pence
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662387%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a%2fPRrfcRmpA06R0fRfJEBw&sysid=1)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _“For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.”_

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662387%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a%2fPRrfcRmpA06R0fRfJEBw&sysid=1)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That’s why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662388%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tbqqx9SNZA1Qr1ZR4QYAaA&sysid=1 "Will you join me in this
endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662389%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dYUyK9wlEtRcINGvj2yGcw&sysid=1)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662380%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YRH3PJ8V6kUoab%2fjyS34wQ&sysid=1 "So, please join me in
bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662387%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a%2fPRrfcRmpA06R0fRfJEBw&sysid=1)
---

name: Mike Pence
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29792%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U4HfR0uft9ifGWt18NzbqQ&sysid=1)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _“For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.”_

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29792%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U4HfR0uft9ifGWt18NzbqQ&sysid=1)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That’s why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29793%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=66b5OGKy5h2B2maj8MWbcA&sysid=1 "Will you join me in this
endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29794%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=coh%2b%2fG7tX7LFtOJGkAucwg&sysid=1)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29705%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TF%2f2zvTjWPGdTHd5Yy2p5A&sysid=1 "So, please join me in
bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29792%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U4HfR0uft9ifGWt18NzbqQ&sysid=1)

body:
| | Spineless "Republicans" running for President have just called on President Trump to drop out of the race.
They're spitting in our faces.

name: Mike Pence
subject: John 3:16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg59vtdogf61nrgihfqsnl3hmgdf6ccv22ffsi0o_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi68o76c5h2bs)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6u9h51su008sm27e7uq07ptl4gk90hihg8ns418_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi68o76c5h2bs)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcdre5t0cfkjnnvk50tedf6rtgh0p05adhf764g0_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi68o76c5h2bs "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5md05tpo1d6arlskv09o1l6bfdqj1sbnma7pgp8_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi68o76c5h2bs)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1741rfl4vnp5eiv99e8nc4qig2su2oonmg14p18_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi68o76c5h2bs "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zctace1kb7pb8d561rea7turbvvfb95mooec323g_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi68o76c5h2bs)
---

Mike Pence

name: The David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Barack Obama’s True Legacy
body:
The devastation and destruction we’re seeing today has been over a decade in the making

| |
---
| | Friend, Joe Biden may go down in history as the worst “president” of the United States...but Barack Obama is still the worst thing that happened to our republic. Because he laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008._ __He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs.__ _ _He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage.__ __And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we’re seeing today has been over a decade in the making – and most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why Freedom Center colleagues Robert Spencer, Daniel Greenfield and Jamie Glazov have joined other conservative powerhouses to publish _Barack Obama’s True Legacy_ –[and why I want you to be one of the first to receive a copy.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo8q1b6l4ndgmkgk1hrhinb1850lihmopp12vob8_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi68o76c5h2bs)** So many of our fellow citizens think the nightmare we’ve been living for the past three years came from nowhere. They think that this “administration” is made up of incompetent fools and that our drastically declining standard of living is the result of Joe Biden’s cognitive state. But the truth is much darker, friend. **This decline was by design – and in many ways, Barack Hussein Obama was its chief architect.** That’s why I believe _Barack Obama’s True Legacy_ is one of the most important books of the year, [**and why if you give a generous gift of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today today, I’ll send you a complimentary copy.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrsh758lpjfpjq7cact46t8s6gufrm4otjc5u5u0_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi68o76c5h2bs) In his first week in office, Joe Biden signed a record number of executive orders, taking a wrecking ball to all the hard work President Trump did to get our country back on track. He brought us back to where Obama left off, and now, with his White House full of Obama holdovers, he intends to finish what his old boss started. We can’t let that happen, friend. But if we can’t stop an enemy that we don’t understand. That’s where this incredible book comes in, and why I need patriots like you to read it immediately.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
Michael FinchPresident, The David Horowitz Freedom Center
---
[**Support the Freedom Center**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zam9cbkejoguno7tgknnfd0l4tuldar65pplrr88_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi68o76c5h2bs)

name: American Defense News
subject: Mandatory U.S. Dollar Recall to Begin on July 26?
body:
If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account...

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see **[this shocking video exposing the government's new plan to recall the U.S. dollar.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z550vidcrveef767gsb8tosr64dl9s27ein9btqg_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi6cor2cjh2bs) The official announcement could come as soon as July 26. As _Business Insider_ says, this dollar recall "could be imminent." That means if you don’t prepare now... You could end up holding a bunch of worthless U.S. dollars. **[Click here to see the three simple steps you must take now to protect your life savings.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2pk3kieve2h0h81aq93amnr0nfknmvplo6af2k0_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi6cor2cjh2bs) Regards, Kendall Castillo

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Can you handle the truth? I think you can.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I’d rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn9e0jo5oggmpf6cibj2s6jdk86abmhh0rbhfv90_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sdnmjj76p9l69g76or3mco67dbjmip66pbme9ie2clhmeq77dj6m4p66obgm6o6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj35dpjc3g7cpr66jhb6p37m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm9o34chjm4pj0s8iv0)
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

| |

---
| | | Today, I want to talk to you about the truth.

The unadorned, unvarnished truth.

The truth is important.

_Without the truth, we cannot order society.
Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings.
Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. _

_**[Can you handle the truth? I think you can.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z89tolsbae1om3h15csegkvuk3bq56koghhgqggo_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi6eoj6c3h2bs "Can you handle the truth? I think you can.")**_

The truth is, I think it's important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me.

This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

**So here 's the truth:** The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America.

**Here 's the solution:** We must DEFEAT the Democrats at _**every level**_ of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity.

**Here 's how we'll WIN: **This all starts with YOU, Friend. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. They were outraised last quarter by $12M, so we cannot afford for a single patriot to sideline themselves.

_**[Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zceaq63u1n1mahc55t40di0snbqsqj674huvffdo_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi6eoj6c3h2bs "Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.")**_
---
| | | [INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zh6mnkdd1r6h4kcaonefp02ebav0f0nkrjabo9no_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi6eoj6c3h2bs "INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12")
---
Thanks for listening to me, I hope you take what I said to heart and take action right away.

**The future of our country is counting on you. **

Thanks,
John Kennedy
(R-Louisiana)

---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjmajj1sq973gs8okju3gdhv9fqitvb3ekd6offo_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi6eoj6c3h2bs "John Kennedy")

name: Mike Pence
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkpgnna9lmetp95bglrfjt7ogh7mpcfoj4pl7htg_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z40slbj0gi1quvschecnt6dojms94d30bm903vlg_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjmkq3s8ngc1ccmimgia9t2suir4mmeh5dgomf90_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlamv5rpj3fo6d3gas97gijkm10emsve6u7sjpl0_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztio6egolvqk637hvjmo23rvjlarersq90nochko_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zehp1gmdem1k8o3d21m2d16irqofe7fgandvl9e8_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs)
---

Mike Pence

name: Elizabeth Warren HQ
subject: Where things stand with Elizabeth’s re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We wanted to give you an update on where things stand with Elizabeth’s re-election campaign. We need to be prepared to run a competitive race no matter what. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66912326/417996791/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15P_OPP_Q_20230723_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODdiNjVlMy01YzI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOdZMBTH7iB1YJL1Xp1yrXzBjqN84UmCTzJ_ABuJr24=&emci=567b65e3-5c29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=587b65e3-5c29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=9027908)
---
We wanted to give you an update on where things stand with Elizabeth’s re-election campaign. [**The truth is, we don’t have a challenger in Massachusetts yet, but that could change any moment, and we need to be prepared to run a competitive race no matter what.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66912329/417996792/-1332346508?amount=20&refcode=EMZ15P_OPP_Q_20230723_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODdiNjVlMy01YzI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOdZMBTH7iB1YJL1Xp1yrXzBjqN84UmCTzJ_ABuJr24=) When she first ran for Senate, she started out 17 points down from the popular Republican incumbent who had truckfulls of campaign cash from Wall Street. Massachusetts had never elected a woman to the U.S. Senate before — and a lot of people thought we still weren't ready to elect one in 2012. But Elizabeth campaigned hard. She called out how our system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else. And we won — by 7.5 points. Since then, Elizabeth has been up against some powerful special interests trying to stop her and our movement: extremist Republicans, Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks who use their deep pockets to try to block change. But we’ve been able to make positive changes, like passing a new tax on massive corporate profits, lowering the cost of hearing aids, getting student loan debt cancelation to President Biden’s desk, pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal, and much more. **Elizabeth is running for re-election because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do to make our government work for everyone in Massachusetts and across the country, not just the wealthy and well-connected. And no matter what happens next in this race, she needs your support in order to campaign for our plans and keep up this fight.** [**We won before because we built a grassroots movement, and that's how we'll keep up the fight for big, structural change. Will you pitch in $20 or anything you can to re-elect Elizabeth Warren, help compete against any potential challenger, and keep her fighting in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66912339/417996801/-1332346508?amount=20&refcode=EMZ15P_OPP_Q_20230723_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODdiNjVlMy01YzI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOdZMBTH7iB1YJL1Xp1yrXzBjqN84UmCTzJ_ABuJr24=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: We wanted to give you an update on where things stand with Elizabeth’s re-election campaign. We need to be prepared to run a competitive race no matter what. | | | We wanted to give you an update on where things stand with Elizabeth’s re-election campaign. = When she first ran for Senate, she started out 17 points down from the popular Republican incumbent who had truckfulls of campaign cash from Wall Street. Massachusetts had never elected a woman to the U.S. Senate before — and a lot of people thought we still weren't ready to elect one in 2012. But Elizabeth campaigned hard. She called out how our system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else. And we won — by 7.5 points. Since then, Elizabeth has been up against some powerful special interests trying to stop her and our movement: extremist Republicans, Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks who use their deep pockets to try to block change. But we’ve been able to make positive changes, like passing a new tax on massive corporate profits, lowering the cost of hearing aids, getting student loan debt cancelation to President Biden’s desk, pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal, and much more. Elizabeth is running for re-election because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do to make our government work for everyone in Massachusetts and across the country, not just the wealthy and well-connected. And no matter what happens next in this race, she needs your support in order to campaign for our plans and keep up this fight. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for everything, Team Warren = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Mike Pence
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn6rjbi5uvn0v57u7datrhqgvfsiq4r579lrf950_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk6qmn3lh140lab0bhal6m6j8rmaq6v2ekj65o9g_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmisedcm9ffgbq2h69cb53ms045j2lcg4fa7tlmg_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrlue2aq3eke4e1ge7d8bae93jbirj6uj4s0u5h8_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztub3fhr79vnqp1jj5ekm0oro57n2kt6eenvk6no_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z82uum2lrsl128mf7njprml05igfhpia6as2iv5o_rp22sh2s8i66p70chi69o32c1h2bs)
---

Mike Pence

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Mandatory U.S. Dollar Recall to Begin on July 26?
body:
If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account...

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see **[this shocking video exposing the government's new plan to recall the U.S. dollar.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81582177ddef45ddbcb52ff06a1ad4fc&_e=aZdX7ahq9d67D5nE3sO_0W8uHB23nKI7TV1wfQn1wmBLBSgDETHfVEe2t_s6PFNrQ4b9VKh4cGdmFcEWTr0lu0xlntKdaldSzmldg58wcNFbV3ys-XKlBjx5eHpkFRerb5UtbPHKyAkoplu7JiKlIKT7mw6uocWTfCXzE2gvgHmLsgaS_ZSPiP0FHIgNU8UfCXp4s1EkXDHpvRQ3iy9QBA8KQK2ex6dV6W8z7xF-8VvXSm_RBAYiQ5icazwRRtrMtLcHqMtBeLPJ6NKWVK4YcX26sdknC2bjHldKWdZWbQw%3D)** The official announcement could come as soon as July 26. As _Business Insider_ says, this dollar recall "could be imminent." That means if you don't prepare now... You could end up holding a bunch of worthless U.S. dollars. **[Click here to see the three simple steps you must take now to protect your life savings.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81582177ddef45ddbcb52ff06a1ad4fc&_e=aZdX7ahq9d67D5nE3sO_0W8uHB23nKI7TV1wfQn1wmBLBSgDETHfVEe2t_s6PFNrQ4b9VKh4cGdmFcEWTr0lu0xlntKdaldSzmldg58wcNFbV3ys-XKlBjx5eHpkFRerb5UtbPHKyAkoplu7JiKlIDGqgG9ea1BlHyLpQTrIZ9-krRUinMCSserfXedWJKa-kfQq0cCSXJY6keq3kn2bdX7mBanD6LDbezZMpSqjq0p_qx46P4Hv9fB-1mRJ3SqQfKrvX89hClt9yWvBoy2nfyzK3MRf1itW7eCl9k0pqC4%3D)** Regards, Kendall Castillo
Managing Editor, _Palm Beach Letter_

name: Mike Pence
subject: John 3:16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5352fce227cf4204a5f839273f6d74fc&_e=HmEWIVgOuKlg2gxFUH2Vw1f-IWVULIvZSYtUZDhEzPBeS3J3t-rlg6Fe0PeIWSArXrK162-yxdNWS0IGWTsoWAEN62U610Mb5UW_V2PTYZxOonKGj61GTVmDVI43UsfhkZwusayJnHOOwE9dXcHoGgoC_FyiAKMV6208Z5m8lxAEoioi1gqu2GKLtNu2FrTv0z46j9mQRIKtrAo_GK9iGVxVTf-dVyF_HsB_0r6ja2Bixebx2SXq2ObUFCFkJhaijBe3BX8iYQjnqq9eVmJb7_1DIAG900urslLWM4tMmmsYKgi10lsfUlI0DCZlxJrwvXnFd6u8twYLy9XmvDrmcL4W04muDr8sODXUISyvQ6DKHv1CSMiqRwn4SAmguZ0alAun_Sj7OFHJ9UJJQ3GRMw%3D%3D)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5352fce227cf4204a5f839273f6d74fc&_e=HmEWIVgOuKlg2gxFUH2Vw1f-IWVULIvZSYtUZDhEzPBeS3J3t-rlg6Fe0PeIWSArXrK162-yxdNWS0IGWTsoWAEN62U610Mb5UW_V2PTYZxOonKGj61GTVmDVI43UsfhkZwusayJnHOOwE9dXcHoGgoC_FyiAKMV6208Z5m8lxAEoioi1gqu2GKLtNu2FrTv0z46j9mQRIKtrAo_GK9iGVxVTf-dVyF_HsB_0r6ja2Bixebx2SXq2ObUFCFkJhaiFj4QqO0WhNhH306c4hknvSO3NFgBUTxwBLrXvbEAEHYnem3aRmkidMpFeKNflU66TqJN47bTQss9hygyF1WTr2Ke03AnI6Ei3qU4Nyhk8ouH0m2afjpaY3ZoKw9-p_99rEqqBch1Ve7rmpcv6qQuLg%3D%3D)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5352fce227cf4204a5f839273f6d74fc&_e=HmEWIVgOuKlg2gxFUH2Vw1f-IWVULIvZSYtUZDhEzPBeS3J3t-rlg6Fe0PeIWSArXrK162-yxdNWS0IGWTsoWAEN62U610Mb5UW_V2PTYZxOonKGj61GTVmDVI43UsfhkZwusayJnHOOwE9dXcHoGgoC_FyiAKMV6208Z5m8lxAEoioi1gqu2GKLtNu2FrTv0z46j9mQRIKtrAo_GK9iGVxVTf-dVyF_HsB_0r6ja2Bixebx2SXq2ObUFCFkJhaikp9CM-CKW4J9t1Tda6lJoRgBsuEUPqGhhYMmCEO23P0hvdbOK-DJYpJ6JE906vD5LgatJOOmWOrJmXrpo8qvj2LTROi68lqMu6KhdmJnRD9SFyeXYks4EWoU0XvLySdYUrYFKVpzJH4Xae0SmfpVPg%3D%3D "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5352fce227cf4204a5f839273f6d74fc&_e=HmEWIVgOuKlg2gxFUH2Vw1f-IWVULIvZSYtUZDhEzPBeS3J3t-rlg6Fe0PeIWSArXrK162-yxdNWS0IGWTsoWAEN62U610Mb5UW_V2PTYZxOonKGj61GTVmDVI43UsfhkZwusayJnHOOwE9dXcHoGgoC_FyiAKMV6208Z5m8lxAEoioi1gqu2GKLtNu2FrTv0z46j9mQRIKtrAo_GK9iGVxVTf-dVyF_HsB_0r6ja2Bixebx2SXq2ObUFCFkJhaiVVtotU5vXhag1KskxnISoFPxV3CBQlgABfd7tso2iFem-me-tgrV65u0fUzMwJYnyIVaawMSJi0uPdGfbFtuGxb_AkVbVZeXLS9wGxOs-uq9ODa1N37RgtnyXZjbPVbuqrdBVqdwtavVyY3ZXmHAkg%3D%3D)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5352fce227cf4204a5f839273f6d74fc&_e=HmEWIVgOuKlg2gxFUH2Vw1f-IWVULIvZSYtUZDhEzPBeS3J3t-rlg6Fe0PeIWSArXrK162-yxdNWS0IGWTsoWAEN62U610Mb5UW_V2PTYZxOonKGj61GTVmDVI43UsfhkZwusayJnHOOwE9dXcHoGgoC_FyiAKMV6208Z5m8lxAEoioi1gqu2GKLtNu2FrTv0z46j9mQRIKtrAo_GK9iGVxVTf-dVyF_HsB_0r6ja2Bixebx2SXq2ObUFCFkJhaiC6iXbsK_OGRZRDNPs9wL9txoX4d9msT_h0Ukg1a6L4tgMbtPz3WMXi4XVMa1kbtTmJGJDruyNfNTDqrsiqmhRL89viP9RbnpZ1UFeDygQ_EPOl7ubBoYFoypleBvhCh5fOdeSClyB0z_Gti4jRrJmg%3D%3D "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

name: Mike Pence
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=19d0a943d6624b4abcd4fceac18f8ac1&_e=0YOcmqotDmAPyEduFQ6nZL8Um-LLyr2RST0oWOpR1Vhhw8-jj2r-PuxfANUAex5yUsGMiPvxf0o02j9kVYqofa2SNml8-tI7uQBHJD6j1ZcUQudkaUs8itaROHpiynHWY9J6B1R5qZbI6TeLJH_v7cboCsQDzi6JoKRQ0O_dZYyU1jZbMocTvqeFtb0FnTjP__JcGJmwtivI28Ak3GgooCIvqpbITaINwjUnOtJjSAwBeZw5TojbFSgPlx_GE6sAoxoexQta5cwlY3bmhUKSz30Ti1nmDiKj14bvG-DdKFcDe-ET6ooVjXGztTViZ5Gy0n8pUnRU5RcoEChJEuBZ564dJY5o982WkVl80daMpTYdEg7D5Bq9y6oTT0GwwN77gPgcCyM6ryOw-lrUvCVzcA%3D%3D)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=19d0a943d6624b4abcd4fceac18f8ac1&_e=0YOcmqotDmAPyEduFQ6nZL8Um-LLyr2RST0oWOpR1Vhhw8-jj2r-PuxfANUAex5yUsGMiPvxf0o02j9kVYqofa2SNml8-tI7uQBHJD6j1ZcUQudkaUs8itaROHpiynHWY9J6B1R5qZbI6TeLJH_v7cboCsQDzi6JoKRQ0O_dZYyU1jZbMocTvqeFtb0FnTjP__JcGJmwtivI28Ak3GgooCIvqpbITaINwjUnOtJjSAwBeZw5TojbFSgPlx_GE6sAPQA1zhoSskVkK8uxxkCAJV0NtdtiTPPBJ2qIz5ptJF1D_-KVNIO1HQWnlgXIVlk8LwbT_z8MA299YgkdKu58VWj6XqfzOJngq7hO6UPyQdYlcsmuWPygda0LILOPyDxrGsfGMZcR5KXpWNapAxi1SA%3D%3D)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=19d0a943d6624b4abcd4fceac18f8ac1&_e=0YOcmqotDmAPyEduFQ6nZL8Um-LLyr2RST0oWOpR1Vhhw8-jj2r-PuxfANUAex5yUsGMiPvxf0o02j9kVYqofa2SNml8-tI7uQBHJD6j1ZcUQudkaUs8itaROHpiynHWY9J6B1R5qZbI6TeLJH_v7cboCsQDzi6JoKRQ0O_dZYyU1jZbMocTvqeFtb0FnTjP__JcGJmwtivI28Ak3GgooCIvqpbITaINwjUnOtJjSAwBeZw5TojbFSgPlx_GE6sAmsY6nnZgZqdhendO5p63YkQtxl_KCrFtaIkTWYXWiGlzo4AO0N7Xfm_PZ2YXSK_X_9Fe2Fy1MqJ-PoFs6KZOE4uGo4tmgYZ2MsM-tbgdl8209ajMuHMBRPvLT8rmjEqnkhTqMsOnNT5CYovwlAZSBQ%3D%3D "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=19d0a943d6624b4abcd4fceac18f8ac1&_e=0YOcmqotDmAPyEduFQ6nZL8Um-LLyr2RST0oWOpR1Vhhw8-jj2r-PuxfANUAex5yUsGMiPvxf0o02j9kVYqofa2SNml8-tI7uQBHJD6j1ZcUQudkaUs8itaROHpiynHWY9J6B1R5qZbI6TeLJH_v7cboCsQDzi6JoKRQ0O_dZYyU1jZbMocTvqeFtb0FnTjP__JcGJmwtivI28Ak3GgooCIvqpbITaINwjUnOtJjSAwBeZw5TojbFSgPlx_GE6sAXgOjYI_C3vPSsCCbWoMaEhON4IKtAn0edCqUqAMlQkIHWhLOTb89p9yWrJY8gjg8AzxNkD_3IgNy4Cd5S6-VHNjrfysWfGNkR9QpLBucaNGkGynE9WqWzlQwJhp79p3wojlXwiHR14FB08SuBSWZ-g%3D%3D)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=19d0a943d6624b4abcd4fceac18f8ac1&_e=0YOcmqotDmAPyEduFQ6nZL8Um-LLyr2RST0oWOpR1Vhhw8-jj2r-PuxfANUAex5yUsGMiPvxf0o02j9kVYqofa2SNml8-tI7uQBHJD6j1ZcUQudkaUs8itaROHpiynHWY9J6B1R5qZbI6TeLJH_v7cboCsQDzi6JoKRQ0O_dZYyU1jZbMocTvqeFtb0FnTjP__JcGJmwtivI28Ak3GgooCIvqpbITaINwjUnOtJjSAwBeZw5TojbFSgPlx_GE6sAKRPJpZEIAQvfo9kyXH09KWAl256oLODJ2Qy4MAJKI9fZ-IKegt3FIjF68eMCoWLvNUQkuwVbVP9iLrH5K9C_W4v-Q0fqBpQULQe8kl_w-AAw7A2g-Z_eI_8U9WvbXoSJ6id50r4UmOYnuyAS0HPf-Q%3D%3D "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=19d0a943d6624b4abcd4fceac18f8ac1&_e=0YOcmqotDmAPyEduFQ6nZL8Um-LLyr2RST0oWOpR1Vhhw8-jj2r-PuxfANUAex5yUsGMiPvxf0o02j9kVYqofa2SNml8-tI7uQBHJD6j1ZcUQudkaUs8itaROHpiynHWY9J6B1R5qZbI6TeLJH_v7cboCsQDzi6JoKRQ0O_dZYyU1jZbMocTvqeFtb0FnTjP__JcGJmwtivI28Ak3GgooCIvqpbITaINwjUnOtJjSAwBeZw5TojbFSgPlx_GE6sAeirQBUynS6haE5Re5JHOulX6ZDvRhGMSEsCPZkvbQ8SRBOCLLhOfvCob4fN1XagCwPe7jc8xDpMBaIeOeAFQqvce8wxTuwQGUxjvZxz5mE2SGpBVZqVPYDEX-m3S-M8MssMqI2NFZ4FE595KvAnS1Q%3D%3D)
---

Mike Pence

name: Mike Pence
subject: John 3:16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6793cba302df4779923fbb814eeda0e1&_e=yIWKV04eAG7QSgrHKQPTLLymmbp253W6Cdi-_HxyPkflGJJhr9aylBAGIs1DjK24hWPC7mqpN7hYuF8NKwlNvH6t2MiFu5H3QXpVCR3R1HmIO6pMrC26BGB_qEq7AUC7QaafxqH__mvI6NA6PY2jlvqlfGpa7vH50HBtMbYbHYT0EsqiF5Zk3sZkrlrfNJULQle47rWjVAdib1s926oFfPvf9msqnLXuB6aNRsTGIj2l6QiO-XXE_jTHGLTdOGsV-az_DqtMXjuaBbex0i7qOO224S3V1iUufTk8httZHcRTozVxx_uKlarySqJKuK51hgvhPajmXDUpW0ym8N5XNFY4azC6_oM0xwNEx6-Yof8ef_a-KHMtjZd1aGdqFgql40Y5GrslZfPeBFmoj-IOOQ%3D%3D)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6793cba302df4779923fbb814eeda0e1&_e=yIWKV04eAG7QSgrHKQPTLLymmbp253W6Cdi-_HxyPkflGJJhr9aylBAGIs1DjK24hWPC7mqpN7hYuF8NKwlNvH6t2MiFu5H3QXpVCR3R1HmIO6pMrC26BGB_qEq7AUC7QaafxqH__mvI6NA6PY2jlvqlfGpa7vH50HBtMbYbHYT0EsqiF5Zk3sZkrlrfNJULQle47rWjVAdib1s926oFfPvf9msqnLXuB6aNRsTGIj2l6QiO-XXE_jTHGLTdOGsV-xp46KxZvNJ1YFCJ6zYrVlPQlXrsT9jw7X5wyR8lGDPrchM_9-xRomPQGffybPf1fga7uSYtHAuuJs9b_kKPB5XuaHUn0p6gqJHf-1y2ejkI29TcuaAlBzAzpriOLds9bFgbx7o2TIvlBPia_r8l8Q%3D%3D)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6793cba302df4779923fbb814eeda0e1&_e=yIWKV04eAG7QSgrHKQPTLLymmbp253W6Cdi-_HxyPkflGJJhr9aylBAGIs1DjK24hWPC7mqpN7hYuF8NKwlNvH6t2MiFu5H3QXpVCR3R1HmIO6pMrC26BGB_qEq7AUC7QaafxqH__mvI6NA6PY2jlvqlfGpa7vH50HBtMbYbHYT0EsqiF5Zk3sZkrlrfNJULQle47rWjVAdib1s926oFfPvf9msqnLXuB6aNRsTGIj2l6QiO-XXE_jTHGLTdOGsV5jdyekiwZA-Zrh7CqIYF-9tYxY33SnmEotRMhT_tAAZeK1o9fPRPAdK9BCt-qZcPnbg4gqCHcgWThcNuBoqBZyxcqMO_R5cA3nG9k_Q7thKtRmNI5Fm8umSCXHlBk4dlKj_2Mx_9fXkpuV3LBrrr8g%3D%3D "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6793cba302df4779923fbb814eeda0e1&_e=yIWKV04eAG7QSgrHKQPTLLymmbp253W6Cdi-_HxyPkflGJJhr9aylBAGIs1DjK24hWPC7mqpN7hYuF8NKwlNvH6t2MiFu5H3QXpVCR3R1HmIO6pMrC26BGB_qEq7AUC7QaafxqH__mvI6NA6PY2jlvqlfGpa7vH50HBtMbYbHYT0EsqiF5Zk3sZkrlrfNJULQle47rWjVAdib1s926oFfPvf9msqnLXuB6aNRsTGIj2l6QiO-XXE_jTHGLTdOGsVVq0GZBJciB6G1Cbj6Wrz-skECUGaKyJdJiNV7jFl9GxIdaKs2V9HzIRi_OoVGKN4fArw9ZWfEZ135wKIWYtenj4JIuRIzLrsrsKEy1RJU82PAFN8RXPXIjt8U-lBZphPQ5EN6qHvdcMjqUxFQzk0gA%3D%3D)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6793cba302df4779923fbb814eeda0e1&_e=yIWKV04eAG7QSgrHKQPTLLymmbp253W6Cdi-_HxyPkflGJJhr9aylBAGIs1DjK24hWPC7mqpN7hYuF8NKwlNvH6t2MiFu5H3QXpVCR3R1HmIO6pMrC26BGB_qEq7AUC7QaafxqH__mvI6NA6PY2jlvqlfGpa7vH50HBtMbYbHYT0EsqiF5Zk3sZkrlrfNJULQle47rWjVAdib1s926oFfPvf9msqnLXuB6aNRsTGIj2l6QiO-XXE_jTHGLTdOGsVkNXMfTQuCiF7eV9oDMWAK0Jv0UEvRo2G7xMD-c7AFXK1Zm39LIO5IfaAgaKH0ADWvBzZMJqTUHW6Xoeluaw6X0IrPsKwEqLB95Km-gRZVLpIWImcQVVlltQaMwoVWmSkxokLUXi_0YBh_8tRumQnLw%3D%3D "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

clean_body: Faith is a central part of my life. | | | | | | When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church. That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18. Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith. As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 " For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life." | Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. I was born again. Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, in that order. Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people. That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. "Will you join me in this endeavor?" | | I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital." God Bless, | Mike Pence | Mike Pence 's Official Store is Now Open! name: Mike Pence
subject: John 3:16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpru7j5lkku4pgi7ap5moahu762lug0duevei9bo_rp22sh2s8i66p70chh64or2c5h2bs)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp0cfl4c1mahl7bm9c4nmf3kf43qcj6kjoukmem8_rp22sh2s8i66p70chh64or2c5h2bs)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6np3fhvsahgho2d3h7a4q9rq7058ankvt3fquf8_rp22sh2s8i66p70chh64or2c5h2bs "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---

clean_body: Faith is a central part of my life. | | | | | | When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church. That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18. Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith. As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 " For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life." | Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. I was born again. Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, in that order. Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people. That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. "Will you join me in this endeavor?" | | I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital." God Bless, | Mike Pence | Mike Pence 's Official Store is Now Open! name: Mike Pence
subject: John 3:16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=700e5b4e14a040189b6f566a0606f059&_e=iZltRFRynXJ__U170raL2P5UTvR6o-0uqomJVHLfdpnCuSTRj9fP8Zp27DQAKJhEGNIPWLgRbWevMvC5nNwP0oSQMK4-L8GmrNN3eJ-3jyIHXhze6B8YrNJM3E-JEl8x4j4SJFgr-oBZct6eV8Qd-VmYbcGe9YI7rH3aGRe7PsLF3To0kU46jquciRI7nym_aSdxJiVL4ps4H099Q9Y3pENq9YoWPF0tGVfxEAlbWGW75ygVIXMh20r6eBlZu5B0POOgRS7Etn07JC5WjtWAl3W0d7D3vK9mtOg58fUXncqjkmZDmgW4A6Kw1u-t59lgyX6PvYsS9SwpVezXDNZd7lgJP5ItjapG94Pzl1Z0pnjEmwuMH1cF07jpe1qQaPT-Z30IPrGwyi0vt2RLWOJ_Gw%3D%3D)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=700e5b4e14a040189b6f566a0606f059&_e=iZltRFRynXJ__U170raL2P5UTvR6o-0uqomJVHLfdpnCuSTRj9fP8Zp27DQAKJhEGNIPWLgRbWevMvC5nNwP0oSQMK4-L8GmrNN3eJ-3jyIHXhze6B8YrNJM3E-JEl8x4j4SJFgr-oBZct6eV8Qd-VmYbcGe9YI7rH3aGRe7PsLF3To0kU46jquciRI7nym_aSdxJiVL4ps4H099Q9Y3pENq9YoWPF0tGVfxEAlbWGW75ygVIXMh20r6eBlZu5B0l8Yc6i_uQ0HJnIJYFmhBIXhfnItqYFuyLVee3791M_GfLuKQB-n0oJKuzyZiYBSSa1YZpoIiMxPfolLnN8PqoooldXJWglpiudSCkHaQWBqn5uHJwnvivVxYaURk0pJI7TStexDHg6xKJrIlXLvlyA%3D%3D)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=700e5b4e14a040189b6f566a0606f059&_e=iZltRFRynXJ__U170raL2P5UTvR6o-0uqomJVHLfdpnCuSTRj9fP8Zp27DQAKJhEGNIPWLgRbWevMvC5nNwP0oSQMK4-L8GmrNN3eJ-3jyIHXhze6B8YrNJM3E-JEl8x4j4SJFgr-oBZct6eV8Qd-VmYbcGe9YI7rH3aGRe7PsLF3To0kU46jquciRI7nym_aSdxJiVL4ps4H099Q9Y3pENq9YoWPF0tGVfxEAlbWGW75ygVIXMh20r6eBlZu5B0pKR0p2Y8RDrFLPfSKzW-xILcFThHGDKE-hvVZlIUkW4hAAJ0USHXkxy_QwxxO-_zRCYrUutAGHY1VOpdPSz9fcMj0wEmWu8GibipeTJ-G_r1bVPF4msSSXraLLbISEmEjtAe9y9dLPFSC7y0Ux8QPg%3D%3D "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=700e5b4e14a040189b6f566a0606f059&_e=iZltRFRynXJ__U170raL2P5UTvR6o-0uqomJVHLfdpnCuSTRj9fP8Zp27DQAKJhEGNIPWLgRbWevMvC5nNwP0oSQMK4-L8GmrNN3eJ-3jyIHXhze6B8YrNJM3E-JEl8x4j4SJFgr-oBZct6eV8Qd-VmYbcGe9YI7rH3aGRe7PsLF3To0kU46jquciRI7nym_aSdxJiVL4ps4H099Q9Y3pENq9YoWPF0tGVfxEAlbWGW75ygVIXMh20r6eBlZu5B00AxeMnI26EDAxB4d5-DIt_0OIhw5eCpppN_ip1Ml7mMLdpcsLKCzaOZ91LkPl_j1kMnIXhi-uLdYrzdIzkj4PSDSJ1M7fVcBE-OA8h9soG6IBArZK0UcGc4_XpmSdxpN0XYc5ivwCkXH56OGyaa0kg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Faith is a central part of my life. | | | | | | When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church. That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18. Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith. As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 " For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life." | Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. I was born again. Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, in that order. Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people. That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. "Will you join me in this endeavor?" | | I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital." God Bless, | Mike Pence | Mike Pence 's Official Store is Now Open! name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Big Tech and we need your help
body:
I'm writing to you today because free speech is under attack and I need your help to defend it.

| |
---
| | Fellow American, Do you trust the government to decide what information is true? _I know I don 't._ But state officials have been colluding with Big Tech companies to do exactly that. That's why we're suing Twitter and the California Secretary of State. Right now we're asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear our case and stop the unholy collusion between Big Tech and the Big Government--collusion aimed to censor American citizens. But we need your help today. **[Which is why I'm asking you to add your name to the Center for American Liberty's Open Letter standing shoulder-to-shoulder Rogan O'Handley as his landmark First Amendment lawsuit goes before the Supreme Court.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6365e65d603a46bead0c4ef034939382&_e=7ihbvkFvm1Hq4oCp_RfiY0Y9Ua-hibXenohX2vE_NdOhMHr5DSnCGFH0E8l81NYOX9jixD7YSvSWREFOKze4zhBVhiJorbbjcAUttHn4kJPSnk4YG7YFFNsWDtYEx4G4GuGkNdTd7lPtKcSeC-C47qTDAeHQZPbj2Do2c8FhAM0oLuXjOj7D8tc_SLfKKCK8HjU4ghTWxJ3wScGVPRoEmfVtKAcpj2OeJ-l5wgkrO9eTxSVnsFCduLtB9VuyuOF2u2RhxMqeC1_H-IdevZilPi0xGyJvq2TqUq3E_Np1v_1ElJKfLjoY81Hw2M1KWApLWNQWrvhrAq0pBDauB85J529YdMgw-7PMghahfyyVuZQM_WLyBsWVti_MDoCVbMEf)** For years, Big Tech giants have taken their marching orders from the radical Left. And these people think it's up to them to decide what's true. They think it's up to them to decide what you are and aren't allowed to say, to believe, and to share. And if you dare challenge what they've decided is true, they'll label you an agent of "misinformation" and shut you up. _That 's what happened to our client._ If you're on Twitter or Instagram, you might have heard of him. **His name is Rogan O 'Handley, but you might know him as "@DC_Draino."** And he did what many reasonable Americans did in 2020--he questioned the 2020 presidential election results and called for an audit. That's when then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla's office contacted Twitter employees instructing them to censor Rogan's tweets. I'm writing to you today because free speech is under attack and I need your help to defend it. **[Will you add your name to the Center for American Liberty's Open Letter of support for Rogan O'Handley and his First Amendment rights?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6365e65d603a46bead0c4ef034939382&_e=7ihbvkFvm1Hq4oCp_RfiY0Y9Ua-hibXenohX2vE_NdOhMHr5DSnCGFH0E8l81NYOX9jixD7YSvSWREFOKze4zhBVhiJorbbjcAUttHn4kJPSnk4YG7YFFNsWDtYEx4G4GuGkNdTd7lPtKcSeC-C47qTDAeHQZPbj2Do2c8FhAM0oLuXjOj7D8tc_SLfKKCK8HjU4ghTWxJ3wScGVPRoEmYfHks8o-2_FXLUoreVTvb2XWhuQgYwqbj1RcwsYYji2BU5Vw2SF6TZfb1Bj26nB5LSbQz_Kesb0TtigblnrHlpKQsto-6o4OHHAELXsgJ3umShqKJELCyexrp-xIamdYhdSNx4QTUB7am5YwnwCUyW0PL0TWrgPI5TbZ-9hOy5s)** This case is bigger than Rogan and it's bigger than Twitter. This all happened before Elon Musk bought the platform. If one political party gets to decide what information is allowed in the modern public square, free speech is dead as we know it. **And if politicians can get away with silencing Rogan, they can get away with silencing YOU.** Our attorneys are working around the clock on this case, and we've faced some devastating defeats. But we haven't given up because we know what this case means to the American people. And we're counting on patriots like you to rally around us right now and support the First Amendment. **[So please add your name to our Open Letter in support of Rogan O'Handley and together let's put a stop to Big Tech censorship.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6365e65d603a46bead0c4ef034939382&_e=7ihbvkFvm1Hq4oCp_RfiY0Y9Ua-hibXenohX2vE_NdOhMHr5DSnCGFH0E8l81NYOX9jixD7YSvSWREFOKze4zhBVhiJorbbjcAUttHn4kJPSnk4YG7YFFNsWDtYEx4G4GuGkNdTd7lPtKcSeC-C47qTDAeHQZPbj2Do2c8FhAM0oLuXjOj7D8tc_SLfKKCK8HjU4ghTWxJ3wScGVPRoEmYm0Z0NnCe4NL64hrPgPTtFVGl5iVxgfNjekkvLrFDAUOoJSACH1dQzuKwyGYSTG8RkxG5Q60_OIbtIvx_MnsYK6K-1mqxWKlchH33vx_eARsqJYLPoAC58kxNXl_V3Lwhf18IAhCrBry8j3UiE_2rPEsEi5dL61FCOdvCZtLvy2)** It's really quite simple:
---
| | \- If one political viewpoint dictates what's allowed on social media, free speech ceases to exist in our country \- Without free speech, we can't have free or fair elections \- Big Tech and Big Government colluding to censor political opponents is a direct infringement of the First Amendment.
---
America as we know it is on the line, and we need conservatives like you to make your voice heard. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29714%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4VQ29dVCwmeISlJesuerpA&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29714%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4VQ29dVCwmeISlJesuerpA&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29725%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tzg%2fH6qpCdmZyArtiGqpvQ&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29726%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K0tXCLkn5UuJXHHDH6Tfqg&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29727%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OaPXcvHq5%2f5Zg8wvdEgxxQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29728%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Thz3PTBfbNWKY3pqEkck%2bw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29729%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oa%2f6cqrCTy6sEtfooz0hoA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29720%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RYoZNS1qRZAwgQllA1EWCQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29721%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z8bkZ34TxoAzinD2hInl2w&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29722%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=85P453CHi3u8USCLF0qAbQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29723%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BVbleDy34%2fJqbRW5Fm9n0g&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29724%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DLO0PVo9Mi%2b6XqXRAnRT7w&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29735%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u4r4JO5rjV%2f9wtjfA4SDYg&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29736%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K2Nyjhr6wsFGNrTTU4QGtA&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29737%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jM8Jp5ghTeHVHMkS1PGrnw&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

body:
If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account...

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see **[this shocking video exposing the government's new plan to recall the U.S. dollar.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu3lphusng261qokc97n0t06n66fmgea46od4kfg_rp22sh2s8i66p70chh62ob2c9h2bs) The official announcement could come as soon as July 26. As _Business Insider_ says, this dollar recall "could be imminent." That means if you don’t prepare now... You could end up holding a bunch of worthless U.S. dollars. **[Click here to see the three simple steps you must take now to protect your life savings.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6bnfrbkqammrsigo7rcvd12ga5mij0m3jgnv810_rp22sh2s8i66p70chh62ob2c9h2bs) Regards, Kendall Castillo

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tribes asking President Biden to protect lands around Grand Canyon
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891351?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | ***217 SIGNATURES MISSING FROM YOUR STATE***
A coalition of 11 Tribes are calling on President Biden to permanently protect 1 million+ acres of the greater Grand Canyon region, preserving their homelands and important cultural relics. The proposed Baaj Nwaavjo I’tah Kukveni national monument contains _**ancient settlements, camps, and rock carvings**_ – some _**more than 10,000 years old!**_ But President Biden hasn’t issued protections yet, and the clock is ticking! Greedy companies **mining for URANIUM** – and it’s **already contaminated drinking water and scarred the land!** More destruction is on its way if President Biden doesn’t protect these Tribal homelands and the Grand Canyon region. [**Stop greedy companies from mining uranium around the Grand Canyon! Add your name by 11:59pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891352?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891353?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The Baaj Nwaavjo I’tah Kukveni national monument would honor tribes’ deep cultural connections to the Grand Canyon. Baaj Nwaavjo means “where tribes roam” and I’tah Kukveni means “our footprints” to the Havasupai and Hopi Tribes, respectively.
These communities are most directly and intensely impacted by uranium mining – from **contaminated groundwater to toxic air pollution and destruction of treasured lands.** And that’s not to mention the abandoned mines that cost taxpayers MILLIONS of dollars to clean up. The bottom line: **uranium mining is bad for people, land, and wildlife and YOU can help stop it.**
[**Friend, will you help amplify Tribal demands and tell President Biden to permanently protect the Grand Canyon region? >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891354?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891353?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Fossil Fuel and Lands Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4f88309300340e28b23b7685dff1783&_e=wakYST59iKDrChQO806mfaQwByahukwhJLObpKzJUvWJppPIOWXfHsJi_gWu7JOaZCajLyj-dbPbYPE-MsFWYf8fQa6pMT-MRUOWXdYFeqor_wQebn8_4jXstTwo4er4npREnLPOoEwwz-vVlypT1UBTp4FhaAxVJaV5uslWSPzFg60ClNYJiWkZL9-kJMhag4Bypl30RP_eIYqJ5X1dqOy2n6RNs_dWOKNVJUxCMS51E8vLqxagkvuhLPcnGxGp9F-WyQWb6VqpnqPK3i6M9w%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4f88309300340e28b23b7685dff1783&_e=wakYST59iKDrChQO806mfaQwByahukwhJLObpKzJUvWJppPIOWXfHsJi_gWu7JOaZCajLyj-dbPbYPE-MsFWYf8fQa6pMT-MRUOWXdYFeqor_wQebn8_4jXstTwo4er4Np-nnwAk6XGX_mnNihbyH0VGwRlFzqZTRYOwHP70pfOSpC42qtRZND4OeBZ8i9UlsM4l5jGpf-CUvRAHgJUOOasrTEB-xgRdG8B8ANVtijG5KaIx_1FYa8vnfaScLHhbcdGPJ9ONy-6DqWn5Rqt94A%3D%3D)

subject: BANKING NIGHTMARE
body:
During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under. We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8% Now, I have a new warning. But this time, it's not just about a few hundred banks. It's about nearly every single bank in America, whether large or small. A veritable banking nightmare! [See what it is here](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd5c5f43fa6a4e67a16b679b899b524d&_e=pbslVz-FFNWD8OM0xu1A7D2It1ipGhChnrqAgtZZOvqrNeNLqzhIzbIW1fw2ypdGvdsSXX9QmO421pgRACOo95DBAMZFMopjf6_RCroLRQ1YS5V79mDN5EqBqvS_7c09hZr_Lt664mJ6gBanceq02W77-vSnYsFPxarHccFup_wqwl2Kn0epSsni1XJR0P2NqGXC3LVOWRmc-in6jpqa-gaUFhSFl8VurNoI5IpYJ6XzcDVZpC4MdyW4j-EovLR-QuzWOFFw7qdS2ggYVzhlMw%3D%3D).
