name: Mike Pence
subject: John 3:16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be99efc8be43461691b20113c5f97289&_e=CrpJRJjQNxon-ZNJJCoMuZ84AMkd-lHnWmuyTyIRpM-nm-wjRjQ9SWpFzY0B-2PBJr3-Kq_FiQFDZpqG_6ELvhhhklmANF8FGzSkAOKNT59coy5uo-EjW2Zoxqw4MABGJyq2Wu3s7r0dZelcZYgyJ9C62CoYMZJF6WYSW0xoWRKEkZkFNoKsy_19qg5ax0v2PyOP1tbigZbCcTvf7Fo2NWk7oqTFH3duLqoENup6aD_ZQFnrfZ3VUTErHbU-GFt_qtNZNlvQaMb1Jxv-aMYCldu8SRAzxlLHMSkyXbZKLv5Z4WR6XtX5iVqVZdPVjikn5aUIUuw202Oxins5p7y0ReCHdNwhbj0mM1IvmoYAE2gXpgyTlXmtutlrzJisny75J93wYErZva1532l1eWgzxw%3D%3D)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be99efc8be43461691b20113c5f97289&_e=CrpJRJjQNxon-ZNJJCoMuZ84AMkd-lHnWmuyTyIRpM-nm-wjRjQ9SWpFzY0B-2PBJr3-Kq_FiQFDZpqG_6ELvhhhklmANF8FGzSkAOKNT59coy5uo-EjW2Zoxqw4MABGJyq2Wu3s7r0dZelcZYgyJ9C62CoYMZJF6WYSW0xoWRKEkZkFNoKsy_19qg5ax0v2PyOP1tbigZbCcTvf7Fo2NWk7oqTFH3duLqoENup6aD_ZQFnrfZ3VUTErHbU-GFt_D_3nOfexZv0sHmR7JspZhVFLzy2wv4vXOqbdXq6-0Ol3kPvSb7Ejg9fXnBg-h1w900eCeMYHyxPfVYBdEmPhqoErzp-OvWM2GSgQyVdkCupqls1TOg_EejQLw7oVjuof1Gsavm1942vXuO0DmuXgbg%3D%3D)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be99efc8be43461691b20113c5f97289&_e=CrpJRJjQNxon-ZNJJCoMuZ84AMkd-lHnWmuyTyIRpM-nm-wjRjQ9SWpFzY0B-2PBJr3-Kq_FiQFDZpqG_6ELvhhhklmANF8FGzSkAOKNT59coy5uo-EjW2Zoxqw4MABGJyq2Wu3s7r0dZelcZYgyJ9C62CoYMZJF6WYSW0xoWRKEkZkFNoKsy_19qg5ax0v2PyOP1tbigZbCcTvf7Fo2NWk7oqTFH3duLqoENup6aD_ZQFnrfZ3VUTErHbU-GFt_KBAUkL0jgVnR3TkwsyHlaqVVgQqQIbHojXC_Zr3qamI8FvvP-SXPKMvgCSyvitNihYVB2O9oVPlf_0e__pzgwXSM9_xzgCEAGm-su3-9vzuO3qyjg5IlrGPmApGQyqu9SJ4DJ7XxcjiaKjE6kouDvw%3D%3D "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

clean_body: Faith is a central part of my life. | | | | | | When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church. That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18. Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith. As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 " For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life." | Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. I was born again. Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, in that order. Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people. That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. "Will you join me in this endeavor?" | | I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital." God Bless, | Mike Pence | Mike Pence 's Official Store is Now Open! name: Tammy Baldwin via Blue Amp Action
subject: Peter, I'd like to share something with you
body:
this is personal...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb715d3b2-d3d6-4f44-8221-f78a51b9741a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | I’m used to being written off, Peter. When I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin in 1997, no one thought I could win — especially when an extremely popular challenger jumped into the race. I remember huddling with one of my staffers at the time, and she said, “Well Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s going to be tough.” I looked her right in the eye and asked, “Do you think I should wait my turn?” The next thing I said was this: I believe that women have to run — especially when it’s hard — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere. I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. And it wouldn’t be the last time our team would make history. When I ran for U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring over a year of attacks, you stood with me again, and we won. Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The battle to protect this seat in 2024 will be no different, and it will require all of us working together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing mega-donors will spend to defeat us and hand the Senate majority over to Mitch McConnell. [Together, I know we can defy the odds once again. So Peter, I’m humbly asking: Will you help us protect this seat and the Senate majority with it by splitting a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and Blue Amp Action? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9eeb170f-b321-4053-a4b7-e41faa96f50b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc78ec3f7-1b55-45de-b2b3-b0731f110bba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Your support has made all the difference time and time again, and I can’t thank you enough for that. I’m so glad to have you on this historic team. — Tammy
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8cb6a78a-ed53-4797-ae0e-44d307071d7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|

---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: The man who predicted the 2008 collapse now issues new warning
body:
If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account...

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see **[this shocking video exposing the government's new plan to recall the U.S. dollar.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29885%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z8JoquRfLFb8KLSLx%2fex1g&sysid=1)** The official announcement could come as soon as July 26. As _Business Insider_ says, this dollar recall "could be imminent." That means if you don’t prepare now... You could end up holding a bunch of worthless U.S. dollars. **[Click here to see the three simple steps you must take now to protect your life savings.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29886%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IAN%2fQfHwwplTPJbDGPa%2fpw&sysid=1)** Regards, Kendall Castillo
Managing Editor, _Palm Beach Letter_

body:
Your response represents every Republican in your state.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35b6dcc7a51f4f22bba0c029f42a50d0&_e=T4BiRqNGJoC6-O0IcI9PHrqU-zuwyZVdbw64Ci8fknvQq22oQdtEQBsHspBS_bikmxbVRFNCyzk5AV4JCEhNJXl3Xv3DjaNJMQ8Ph4Y7474kYAtqQKUxopsN2zxBAKsNnJZcEaxW4igOphYZLPP3JrCsZGcYBJAtqdsQJRfakkVaR94SLr9sHir8psPCgVL1oh3Fr-ycTxid3-kr7eqgybYe7_nax1OgNWidMWJ8ksjpttYvp1x_pifBmJVpS9KLLH3GTomoAeV5BYhBkIqg5FSV-azqoPmedZMNz4liLcfcy9ld5u7iMJopjpLfsk2wTiYuG4XcSc70h89mjjesnE0KWTw3176JJGfVeFtV7y_neXfPYpAL_0OBTWYwLy_Abk3yxJVVx3GP2Lz-FnlWH6HWMOOeoue6teHA-0SaJQwMddZxUqXpjestz6rK-nE85KeU2XZDaEKI4vKTgjDa-JUVC0O8K9P0BSxxPMCzx5g%3D)

The most important thing our Party must do is elect a REPUBLICAN to the White House AND elect a REPUBLICAN Majority to the United States Senate, Friend.

**The chaos and ineptitude of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and their cronies in the Senate have devastated our once GREAT country. **

Loyal grassroots supporters like you can be the difference between putting CONSERVATIVES back in charge to restore American greatness or potentially losing the Senate to Chuck Schumer, Adam Schiff and other radical Socialists forever.

That's why I'm asking if you will take one of the most important surveys to date: _**[The Official 2024 Presidential Canvass.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35b6dcc7a51f4f22bba0c029f42a50d0&_e=T4BiRqNGJoC6-O0IcI9PHrqU-zuwyZVdbw64Ci8fknvQq22oQdtEQBsHspBS_bikmxbVRFNCyzk5AV4JCEhNJXl3Xv3DjaNJMQ8Ph4Y7474kYAtqQKUxopsN2zxBAKsNnJZcEaxW4igOphYZLPP3JrCsZGcYBJAtqdsQJRfakkVaR94SLr9sHir8psPCgVL1oh3Fr-ycTxid3-kr7eqgybYe7_nax1OgNWidMWJ8ksjpttYvp1x_pifBmJVpS9KLLH3GTomoAeV5BYhBkIqg5FSV-azqoPmedZMNz4liLcfcy9ld5u7iMJopjpLfsk2wTiYuG4XcSc70h89mjjesnL8IAvuYk_mannQkRSX8mqs8g44O2iq610cO4P5oy2rNC7oijXHDB305LKD4Nfkg_ZAStMoXO6kKFNaGSXdFSpj5we34TQItvTL-NmeLD7yysa23gby7c4JxysXHGE9IbwK55WdpD9TWCNoBvKu_bfE%3D)**_

name: Ruben Gallego
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
This June, I introduced the Extreme Heat Emergency Act.
#

Peter,
On July 18th, Phoenix broke its record for the most consecutive days over 110 degrees.
The record was 18 days before, and we’re at 24 days now.
The next day, July 19th, Phoenix had its hottest day of the year — 119 degrees.
Extreme heat kills more people every year than just about every other natural event combined — hundreds in Maricopa County in 2022, and at least 18 so far this year.
All too often people are left to deal with this deadly heat on their own, without support.
**That has to change.**
In April of 2022, I introduced the _Excess Urban Heat Mitigation Act_ to help cities deal with the causes and impacts of excess heat.
And this June, I introduced the _Extreme Heat Emergency Act._
Here’s how it works: There’s a list of natural disasters that qualify for support from FEMA.
My bill adds heat to that list, so people suffering through extreme heat events get the same support as people hit by hurricanes or floods.
Here’s the problem: I introduced that bill with support from my colleagues, but Kevin McCarthy and the GOP control the House.
That’s why I need you.
[**Add your name here, and tell Congress that you support this critical legislation. It will save lives.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_exheat/?source=em230723-1-subs&refcode2=831.734936.MhgLZH&akid=831%2E734936%2EMhgLZH)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_exheat/?source=em230723-1-subs&refcode2=831.734936.MhgLZH&akid=831%2E734936%2EMhgLZH)
Thank you for your help here, Peter. It means a lot.
-Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=831%2E734936%2EMhgLZH). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=831_734936_MhgLZH&akid=831%2E734936%2EMhgLZH)

[**This special election will determine whether Democrats defend their razor-thin majority in the chamber →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTEBokwJ0izHXMWrpJl2hHzuyXEgrsfvaJS747zvZumIy3U6mFdS9U4_OJMCWnx9to8o7SFrzOvjLd21_x3jbM_QFO-mGvZ_8tneRNDowzmN7i5lMcQMUqainU0oQAf5khkYvp-d5EeoiVyVMF3p-5zECI8cc5_ccpccmWL7OwPK0BWy8VXKgpmnVJBWmz2vJdhwDcJsD20ZjQ08hsZlXAavmanarAJtQZ5vfaLuk5TTFKfX_hYnebHyGccWExmOW_ZIIyVX0pxbBzZW5hkGL6CUVuhSwOJnqYcSYCfDnmNHsZWznanmrYa4SPm73ITYmjN3we2X8pzRT8thohZSe0ikJU2Fhn5Cbt1ExQg-nFbe82JfMPneorB4h73tY_gZQGeKbrv-A0JJj0Ed5daMuFLrnd1fa4CjQY2cF3RRIhy0URaF0nhvhj8YOaSKEZRrWrPBzBC6HtYh82pJbD39kWnTCzqkud2jp2cDwcru_RgHMuOSXE0RTxN8xC9dqdhKoob1AvptDDDWUER8i43UzKvAbnTPXfXA25BVFruv82hY5xF9Oi-PrWdGG-M-mioblFbnV9AUO2-irIcp5YW4_eY7G0TIJ53NUxyHZEO-rSE0sgsOgyA_aDuqtu_Zq4xofQ/3y4/m2KlIWSURS6Zl_lVEo27qQ/h2/NUOnnNyqHAQvLlu3g8pr1nXlQAOobaxSpJn4QUD8gUQ)
3️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Campaign funds surge ahead of November’s elections**
In Virginia, with split control of the legislature and ultra-competitive margins, this fall’s elections are gearing up to be ultra-competitive. [**Campaign spending reveals a high dollar push in the months leading up to Election Day →.**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6EOSj-f2GB18S5Jyd3qa9145A8BcbrVX0it-CFKq9ZH-3K98n-8kCiUpIV4gad7BObSs5f4ABaw6hzUaqBhc8ZjRAa6bVy9uWzEOY9xAkym_iUY5gDLQc_0jjb0Xgt6m02WWE1wTVY5HJHMctMB5e2WOPh6Ijz3FOZFUIU-EvFH3YNpzQmaYQdfKjvbZZ5UkpfSIk0J871eDbBP_UjpKQf9Og4xBNL3QsWm9RffR4zZRgjCkyksBBOhmQIkl1s5T0iqrAEOS2fRfhv-cXx3x1Egy-QwO3_gX3Aqna90Jr-TiMpiQuioMnIJMF4OD3lcYzWazaGVKFtjpwjXKTjW-xYCoSZhvWpOlG1fgNVJhvbBGXXV-2TR9EyjZb737pXGEC7kR_KqMshX_IpyAkDsLE-LmNu7U52d0yAF-coFcGSGWyYM6NDwHLNc1tcKPt7KQ5Kw_QXkrSHBRlx_hDWsPjn_3YqsGhgT59OFnLebMpjmqonICkCAZSubFn2pztzggC7k2gWnlpKgYNsnCYjIhGMQ0TFN7HrkU7RUvN9Qg6kcONGh8EyPCoPIfFHQ2fFB-slsogT9WAUwsOf1EEg3Js--R/3y4/m2KlIWSURS6Zl_lVEo27qQ/h3/UkEGB30hJcEckO46Ucq34uXpcH5kUhiNifBXuaRIm6Q)

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The Sun's re-emergence is a gift...
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWsSy2_DN2

In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced
first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad
journalism....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWsSy2_DN2

FROM THE
DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ

Dear
friend,

In over
sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand
the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly
the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things
right.

In
today's media landscape there are far too many publications that
get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political
implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New
York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over
politics and people over party.

Its
in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President
Trump serve as a case in point.

When I
defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an
avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to
fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's
deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky
and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the
Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be
first rate.

It will
be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can
be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that
its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments
in American journalism.

I've been
impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an
uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun's
success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of
truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage
you to join the Sun today.

Join the
Sun Now →

Every
person matters in this effort.

Don't
wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

Alan
Dershowitz

Columnist, The New York Sun

Join the
Sun Now →

name: Mike Pence
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj3nsp364vcvh3tfvp7rh8htu6rtv8uitv4r6lng_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or4c9h2bs)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk89ah5mnsn7f6rnda8mj85ggjktqu595cubn2j8_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or4c9h2bs)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp58nkvr07oaj81figmli19v2f8tgeeijbt7cq0g_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or4c9h2bs "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1fhpjiqra0dbkfrgh2ihmf6j0glkhvs835k178o_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or4c9h2bs)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg4s9ilefh0l8ti9ove3gfsv5q5i4sh79sfbg4qg_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or4c9h2bs "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z90gjp03kieqi9j5edt9hgc65hfcttthmntfljfg_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or2chh2bs)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr3fdto2nhrobjkacovnh8vudnohr8lr2919pau8_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or2chh2bs)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr6s90v1f1ofaphus4j2dpm93bkm5fbehcnbe8r8_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or2chh2bs)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsvu8r1pe4v3ia6vcoid9gvvv6ji94h26ihlc8k0_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or2chh2bs)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsfll8te99tqac9fenffl28hrvugm9gjmfbpbslg_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or2chh2bs)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgp1236l8fr76kh1pp0d9es70e62n8sedmmjd34o_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or2chh2bs)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)
---
|
---
****
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6b5lcdj9cd14tdrgcnkfj2703vf1u16g50csjko_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or2chh2bs)
---
[**JOIN TEAM CAO!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zujm67vm26m48rnnocdr3d2k58l2ntj7tt05ufko_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj68or2chh2bs)

body:
A government led by Believers is a government that will honor God. | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=cef3a5003e664b5ab50a15dc4d3c4ed1&_e=yimrm3KzdS8jN9TISeBJqorf_eBeVgOGAxkUi5Wn-vCLkzz9NO6K8iKVkXfq4BteaLOT7abJE7pVVet8ZqjHRYZwj648DO09_i1MfjREljbYcIJqCkRWTCn7hc0tgEGyJJ-LJe9YuPNP7xo96RQW9G5duf2dOLv0qKdW68zDCWnAuZ4j-rlDSBQNSG0c47ZHVR6cH_NBNM_mouOYMrEpR7MTRPr5T5vpuHaooWIOu2zVzv_MN-TSaVsKwE5BYFNU)

At Hold The Line, we are fighting to bring the Gospel into one of the darkest corners of American life-- politics. We cannot simply write off the political realm and cede that territory to the enemy.

Our [**Hold The Line Headquarters**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=cef3a5003e664b5ab50a15dc4d3c4ed1&_e=yimrm3KzdS8jN9TISeBJqorf_eBeVgOGAxkUi5Wn-vCLkzz9NO6K8iKVkXfq4BteaLOT7abJE7pVVet8ZqjHRYZwj648DO09_i1MfjREljYn8ARHKMpo6Ayfy_k0PBIh2dG3VIA1hoqJDbeX_5X501Pef7SRI6K35EqRTYiYrXvvRksxRr0PI4FCEi4WZE1WSOby2o9n5n_3WzJBp9h5wynX7Cez06gJT_JbHOZrDj5b9l6ZXtYRfVpkw5gv-uAk), Camp Elah is our home base in that fight. Our staff ministers to congressional leaders, staff, and much of the political class making decisions that impact our daily lives. A government led by Believers is a government that will honor God. That is what we are working towards through Camp Elah.

name: Mike Pence
subject: John 3:16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4mrdd21669lctr8lmju619eav22j43h8kgda4mo_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj6cob4c1h2bs)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5u92oft7scipedti90ad52pl2mhb4u78kg4rc4g_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj6cob4c1h2bs)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv43sgmoi2lqasmvoll32bhgbvgbbvplp4et3odo_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj6cob4c1h2bs "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv0ve0vdo0fhlpoftgnl5km097umhiiorqcu9br0_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj6cob4c1h2bs)
---

I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. **[So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgnp0b2c28og3vs4umon1f2cmc1uev082qcevva8_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj6cob4c1h2bs "So, please join me in bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital.")**

God Bless,

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsu34bkid6nrkbiav6shp6g2j9etlbhobq86386g_rp22sh2s8i66p70chj6cob4c1h2bs)
---

Mike Pence

| | | My birthday is coming up, and the gift I really want is to celebrate it with you, my core team of supporters. Can you join us for food, fun and maybe an embarrassing round of “Happy Birthday"? Wednesday, August 9th
5:30 pm Plumbers Union Hall
1519 Rollins Road, Burlingame [](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=dd95215373&e=c0babbc643) Turning another year older is a good reminder of how much I love the job of representing you on the Board of Supervisors, and how much important work we still have to do together:
* Preparing for climate change by making investments to combat wildfires, flooding and sea level rise
* Improving health care, including greater access to mental health services and interventions
* Housing homeless individuals and families and providing intensive wraparound services such as job training

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=741b4f5a9f&e=c0babbc643) I would still very much appreciate anything you can donate – the limit for this race is $2,000 per donor and every dollar helps get our message out! Hope to see you August 9th! Best regards, David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5 P.S. No matter the size of your contribution, donating today is the best birthday present you could give me – I would be so grateful if you could [pitch in](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=a5037ca1d6&e=c0babbc643) today. **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**

Peter, if you know me, you know that asking for campaign donations is probably my _least favorite_ part of the job.
And that's not to say that grassroots donations like yours don't matter, because they do _– so much_ more than I can ever articulate. In fact, it's thanks to grassroots donors like you that I'm even able to hold the most powerful and corrupt forces in the nation accountable –**because I know that, no matter how many millions of dollars they spend slandering me, I have an unwavering base of supporters behind me. **
I hate asking for money because I don't want to be distracted from my work – but with fights as large and vital as ours, I just can't afford to fall short of my fundraising goals. So I have to ask: [**Please, will you chip in right now to power my fight for progress in New York and beyond? I need to raise $10,000 before my fundraising deadline passes and I need _your help_ to do that.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66915954/418007455/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1136-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmRiZWMzOS02MTI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDILpoQRFP_W-41Kat5gv5hsQceiJk1EPD74LjheRns=)

Peter, thanks to grassroots donors like you, I've been able to go toe-to-toe with some of the largest forces in our nation without fear of how their massive war chests would affect me. I've been able to take the gun lobby to court, hold Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic, call out far-right state legislatures for harming LGBTQ+ people, go after Big Polluters, and more.
My work is _only_ possible because __ of grassroots donations from people like you, Peter. But with the rights of millions under attack, we must continue this important work.
**So I hate to ask, but I have to:[Will you rush a donation of $5 or more right now to help me hit my $10,000 goal and continue my fight for progress? Every dollar enables me to fight for you best.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66915959/418007460/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1136-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmRiZWMzOS02MTI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDILpoQRFP_W-41Kat5gv5hsQceiJk1EPD74LjheRns=)**

Letitia

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Peter, you’ve been chosen to sponsor a Courier newsroom
body:
We’re left with a huge information gap that our local newsrooms across eight battleground states are working tirelessly to fill.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1267%2E120351%2EYn9hPb)
Peter — the 2024 election is already proving to be a critical test for the mainstream media and American democracy. Donald Trump is the first former President to be indicted on criminal charges, but he’s still the overwhelming favorite to win the Republican presidential nomination.
**The situation is creating a familiar dynamic.** The mainstream media gives Trump wall to wall coverage while he and his cronies flood right-wing media with lies and propaganda. Now, right-wing misinformation is thriving again and the mainstream media is more focused on drawing big ratings than they are on covering the local news stories that actually impacts people’s lives.
At Courier, our local newsrooms across eight battleground states work tirelessly to correct misinformation and cover the stories that matter most in local communities.
To do that, we make our news stories freely available to anyone who needs them. We publish directly in the online spaces where misinformation thrives.
But, in order to keep it that way, we have to fundraise to support the work of our journalists.
**In that spirit, we’re excited to announce our Sponsor a Newsroom Project.**
You’ve been selected to sponsor the local Courier newsroom in your home state! We’ve set a goal to raise $12,500 and reach readers across Pennsylvania. **Can your local Courier newsroom count on you to chip in $5 now and help them spread their stories to every corner of the state?** [**⇢ Yes, I’ll sponsor my local Courier newsroom with a contribution of $5 now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230723?refcode=em20230723&refcode2=1267_120351_Yn9hPb&akid=1267%2E120351%2EYn9hPb) ****
---
Our Sponsor a Newsroom Project will be game-changing for our newsrooms and the communities they serve — especially as the presidential election takes off. Our news teams in states like Wisconsin and Virginia have already shown what a powerful role trustworthy local journalism can have in their recent state elections.
**The stakes will be even higher in November 2024.**
This plan only works though if we can raise enough money to help outfit our newsrooms with the staff, technology, and resources they need.****
[**Will you chip in $5 so we can hit our $12,500 fundraising goal today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230723?refcode=em20230723&refcode2=1267_120351_Yn9hPb&akid=1267%2E120351%2EYn9hPb)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230723?refcode=em20230723&refcode2=1267_120351_Yn9hPb&akid=1267%2E120351%2EYn9hPb)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1267_120351_Yn9hPb&akid=1267%2E120351%2EYn9hPb)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1267%2E120351%2EYn9hPb)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: Fwd: Did you see the news?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | Begin forwarded message:

**From:** Indiana Republican Party
**Date:** July 13, 2023 at 10:01:08 AM
**To:** Friend
**Subject:** **Re: Did you see the news?**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/5b8950c0cc336a18/81def3c2aea79a1bc3d6b838967d376c/40313)

Friend, **Did you see the news?** **Yesterday, we announced that Congressman and Republican U.S. Senate candidate Jim Banks will keynote our state dinner on August 10, 2023, at the JW Marriott Indianapolis!** The evening will also include the graduation ceremony of the **2023 cohort** of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series, our seminar and leadership training program that's helping minority Republicans across the state step into party and civic leadership roles. name: Alex Padilla
subject: re: Freedom to Vote Act
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We should be making it easier, not harder, for Americans to participate in our elections.
#

Friend, this week, I joined Senate Democrats in reintroducing the _Freedom to Vote Act._
I’m proud to be a cosponsor of this important bill, and I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why it’s so important -- especially now -- to pass this legislation and protect our democracy.
**The _Freedom to Vote Act_ will:**
* Make Election Day a public holiday 🎉

* Ensure every state allows same-day voter registration ✅

* Set a minimum of 15 consecutive days of early voting for federal elections, including two weekends 🗓️

* Ban partisan gerrymandering 🚫

* Help get Big Money out of politics 💸

This bill is our chance to pass sweeping protections to our democracy, to safeguard the right to vote, end gerrymandering, and to push back against the growing onslaught of voter suppression bills in states across the country.
It includes some of the same proven reforms that I helped implement as California’s Secretary of State to make our elections more accessible and more secure -- reforms that all of our Senate colleagues should support to ensure a healthy democracy.
But the sad fact is that Republicans are uninterested in protecting the right to vote. They’d rather maximize their own power at the expense of the majority. **So I’m asking for your help to demonstrate that the American people _overwhelmingly_ support these common-sense reforms to our elections. **
[**Friend, will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Freedom to Vote Act_? We should be making it easier, not harder, for Americans to participate in our elections.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Freedom-To-Vote-Act-July23/?source=em230723-1-30&akid=1436%2E159979%2EdBwMoO)**
**[SIGN ON](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Freedom-To-Vote-Act-July23/?source=em230723-1-30&akid=1436%2E159979%2EdBwMoO)**
Make no mistake, we must pass comprehensive voting rights legislation like the _Freedom to Vote Act_ in order to protect our democracy.
Thanks for your support on this.
Alex Padilla
**[SIGN ON](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Freedom-To-Vote-Act-July23/?source=em230723-1-30&akid=1436%2E159979%2EdBwMoO)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1436%2E159979%2EdBwMoO)

name: Zak Malamed
subject: Some pictures from our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
Take a look:
#
Earlier this week I got to go out and spend time meeting voters in NY-03. I listened to their concerns and told them a bit about me and how I would serve them if elected to Congress.
**I loved every second of it** , and our team captured some great pictures that I want to share with you:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230723?refcode=em20230723&amount=5&refcode2=335_8507_f5hQbT&akid=335%2E8507%2Ef5hQbT)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230723?refcode=em20230723&amount=5&refcode2=335_8507_f5hQbT&akid=335%2E8507%2Ef5hQbT)
**T his is why I got into this race:** to give back to the community that gave so much to me and my family. Throughout this campaign I want to spend as much time as I can out in the district, connecting with voters and learning what they need from their Representative. But in order for me to take everything I’m hearing from voters and actually put it into action in Washington, we first have to win this race.
**The issue is, there are a lot of costs that go into running a campaign like this** , including growing and paying our campaign team, printing flyers, running phone banks, and more — and it is up to us to drum up the resources we need to cover these costs.
[**But the more we raise from emails like this one, the more time I can spend out in the community — and the less time I have to spend on the phone, dialing for dollars. So what do you say? Will you chip in $5 to help send me to Congress so I can fight for our community?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230723?refcode=em20230723&amount=5&refcode2=335_8507_f5hQbT&akid=335%2E8507%2Ef5hQbT)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230723?amount=5&refcode=em20230723&refcode2=335_8507_f5hQbT&akid=335%2E8507%2Ef5hQbT)**
With gratitude,
Zak
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=335%2E8507%2Ef5hQbT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=335%2E8507%2Ef5hQbT)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)

name: Diana
subject: re: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please don't delay
Hey team -- It’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

With the 2024 elections heating up and the battle for Senate control at a fever pitch, we need to stay on top of our strategy. That’s why James Carville reached out and requested your input for an exclusive strategy interview.

**But he didn’t get an answer from you -- and now he's 28 responses short of what he needed in Pennsylvania!**

[**We NEED enough top Democrats like you to participate in this strategy interview to drive us to victory, but the deadline to respond is midnight tonight. Please, will you take 3 minutes and help us WIN? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11397%2E9716520%2EIfWdtJ)

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11397%2E9716520%2EIfWdtJ)
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a crucial part of our team,

Diana, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: James Carville
Date: Jul 22, 2023
Subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania >>
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11397%2E9716520%2EIfWdtJ)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11397%2E9716520%2EIfWdtJ)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewJuly/](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11397%2E9716520%2EIfWdtJ)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230723-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11397%2E9716520%2EIfWdtJ)
---

Thank you

\- James

I’ve experienced socialism, and I won’t let Biden & the radical Dems put America down that path.

My name is Hung Cao.

I’m a Vietnamese Immigrant, and according to Chuck Schumer, I should be a DEMOCRAT.

But NO, I’m a PROUD conservative and I’d NEVER let Schumer tell me how to think.

Allow me to share the deeply personal reason I’m a Republican and NOT a Democrat: Shortly before the fall of Saigon, my family immigrated from communist Vietnam to the US.

I am so proud to now live in the land of the free, and the home of the brave. I served our country as a Special Operations Officer for 25 years, with combat deployments in Iraq, Afghanistan and Somalia.

Listen, fellow patriot, I didn’t escape Communist Vietnam and defend Freedom with the Navy just for Chuck Schumer and his Radical Left Democrats to drive us to socialism once again.

**[So won’t you pitch in now to help me FIRE Schumer? I am in desperate need of your help because the latest polls show Democrats WINNING in November:](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0d6b6f929a644a5f9cde5a885b5f9e10&_e=eG5ILadBXJOMXO3eTcYNvfmc2wznm2NAA64v5c_WjJzIiDXotZR3rNvAigOIASfbIn0K7mt2yteBOMU0FkpIJ80Qclz6xGPLuWrvnsAiPKWKs12xIE5C2CCcCkLTzP45jjh8A9REbTzAeFmSatxW7w-ST4f54cizxiH5v7-6XcagEkKz6fna3MqyMn1uBW4ryHTsQ0E7gR1s4pfVrKs1llksRCHJIh8fjX1uyTBOeD60Qj3DBjKCrJCRWOgiekouTyV0WM9LEUHuOe3N5teSvBsZgrMo5vexM9qrb_B0AFUebZLNC2a4kifDRsO7efJezYoz_NGa6dMs19Ai2N0eW3Yy3QaDVPEyGqQIe8yym8803D8EmWPpa9w-m9BwQWqN)**

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: Sending you this email gives me no pleasure.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Sending you this message gives me no pleasure, Friend, I'm not excited to tell you that our country is being run into the ground by coastal elites like Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.
I'm not excited to put yet another political message in your inbox. But if I'm going to make it to Washington and defeat an establishment Democrat who is nothing but a rubber stamp for Joe Biden, then I have to do everything in my power to rally patriotic Americans across the country to win! Friend, my name is Sam Brown. That's me in the pictures.

name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=febbc62f664a4e998d0e8cd1f0223307&_e=1QrN6XvdS96LOye5cYFBAsAtLRQvO7VNBVV--03c92QfzIMKQknv800sPi3T9iCObhYrGjtAtU4Z--5hP0QHzzLkkWGYBGBB7DtLuhdMc0exdFi98q9_cyXVf0bv7Ac8Ix9-O6mS73yhrGnYCrD6rwxkpFJ6_cdTt71_55maCy-_9jX2_kQ4U8rYKd_z3xbr8GUOyEDONJurUBGK2C5mDLeTfPDnb1JL9xFBzJnXoqhzdbC8t1dSLV-E_BfiIQOp65pc9aLwoPvvSlHMgMU1s3RgtYuAPr6fGcfbehQQt7UHa_9Jh7LFyf_KIaVyLXvE)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=febbc62f664a4e998d0e8cd1f0223307&_e=1QrN6XvdS96LOye5cYFBAsAtLRQvO7VNBVV--03c92QfzIMKQknv800sPi3T9iCObhYrGjtAtU4Z--5hP0QHzzLkkWGYBGBB7DtLuhdMc0exdFi98q9_cyXVf0bv7Ac8Ix9-O6mS73yhrGnYCrD6rwxkpFJ6_cdTt71_55maCy_itJ6TOcNicD2ooB0HjOeWG6j6-eW93YpuNrz4ycpJqNLPrpvfen4gqjmOCHJJs4ONRSBOCR0Pk8utIOZUMi_nh4vQYBuR1O_7K1pHG1ChqOu3VGwzPRYHKGXGJX1tj5T_ujztnhw6RM2hWQE0SgBq)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=febbc62f664a4e998d0e8cd1f0223307&_e=1QrN6XvdS96LOye5cYFBAsAtLRQvO7VNBVV--03c92QfzIMKQknv800sPi3T9iCObhYrGjtAtU4Z--5hP0QHzzLkkWGYBGBB7DtLuhdMc0exdFi98q9_cyXVf0bv7Ac8Ix9-O6mS73yhrGnYCrD6rwxkpFJ6_cdTt71_55maCy8O3BYv-J1GFBx48_qIOef3oDbz42IYLFLBy_vJZW-qKoAKf3LwfvKvV3hpqaBk9pQk8gr30QCnaMSwStifYS7YwpxqyDrhTKp1mZ0EirBNGNr8tmmGyCyP3E1vD8gHiz8QqvH9r_4wDlrJ-3y1hds1)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=febbc62f664a4e998d0e8cd1f0223307&_e=1QrN6XvdS96LOye5cYFBAsAtLRQvO7VNBVV--03c92QfzIMKQknv800sPi3T9iCObhYrGjtAtU4Z--5hP0QHzzLkkWGYBGBB7DtLuhdMc0exdFi98q9_cyXVf0bv7Ac8Ix9-O6mS73yhrGnYCrD6rwxkpFJ6_cdTt71_55maCy8OuUHNzYJFQewrYgoFCTNuIoeYKeArphTOKr7Y3mvM_ULjb-wWgOY5so3qIoJaYVh9nsO31hbVDEVFwuwju9aB_ZXpgvzyZBdqsnCBLn5PH0w9pLNKx6JcHH_q1TeKvbMM1u61Xuzc1HWqC66ISRLO)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=febbc62f664a4e998d0e8cd1f0223307&_e=1QrN6XvdS96LOye5cYFBAsAtLRQvO7VNBVV--03c92QfzIMKQknv800sPi3T9iCObhYrGjtAtU4Z--5hP0QHzzLkkWGYBGBB7DtLuhdMc0exdFi98q9_cyXVf0bv7Ac8Ix9-O6mS73yhrGnYCrD6rwxkpFJ6_cdTt71_55maCy9LUD4-PZkJh4x8TffbYM9Ju5wdpMkQE3InNZHfSTRR628PrasIzH9vwmrhxQMlzfiKwEY1PDy7UjTZSZIKf9DlwrXjQhAdcdyH0-7iAD-U0micJ3DVTDT11bNb_xgpXhuNcdzav8dQwiooKamN5Wwi)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=febbc62f664a4e998d0e8cd1f0223307&_e=1QrN6XvdS96LOye5cYFBAsAtLRQvO7VNBVV--03c92QfzIMKQknv800sPi3T9iCObhYrGjtAtU4Z--5hP0QHzzLkkWGYBGBB7DtLuhdMc0exdFi98q9_cyXVf0bv7Ac8Ix9-O6mS73yhrGnYCrD6rwxkpFJ6_cdTt71_55maCy8SchT5fDqF3O0_i3hz3Ge1qUgtHedvJyUvz7bexPG7ZY1iKJN7ouva04_JomlcN36sekkop_SD8Jc8bv2DcJPvGWYAChTKAfbwCtf2i5IdLabSc3ccaL9x3Vbb0byxMGaMwz9s87HLCVgTVdmKmEqf)
---

body:
| Peter,

Did you see our poll? We want to hear your opinion. Supreme Court Justices Clarence Thomas and Justice Samuel Alito constantly received _lavish_ gifts without reporting them.

**Should the Supreme Court be held to the same ethical standard as Congress when it comes to gifts to stop future potential corruption?_[Tell us your answer before the poll closes at MIDNIGHT:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66920911/418026324/-1177593706?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230723_SV_1.2_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_SCOTUS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzNkZjIwMC02YjI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DV9Mhdojd7M0MTKwdsAKaOviuk9ID7yHASutLw5Es14=&emci=47356de0-0627-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=133df200-6b29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5260669)_** | | **[Vote now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66920913/418026325/-1177593706?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230723_SV_1.2_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_SCOTUS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzNkZjIwMC02YjI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DV9Mhdojd7M0MTKwdsAKaOviuk9ID7yHASutLw5Es14=&emci=47356de0-0627-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=133df200-6b29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5260669)**

clean_body: I believe there’s not a thing we can’t do if we do it together -- and I really mean that. | | | Peter, I don’t send emails like this often. So, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain just how far we’ve come over these past two years and why We have accomplished so much since Kamala and I were sworn in in January of 2021: We confirmed Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court; passed the first significant federal gun safety law in nearly 30 years; passed the biggest investment in combating climate change in our nation’s history; got to work lowering costs for working families; brought the unemployment rate to its lowest in 50 years... the list goes on. I believe there’s not a thing we can’t do if we do it together -- and I really mean that. Folks like you who support our party and our work made all of this possible. Peter, for as much as we’ve accomplished, we have some unfinished business on our agenda. We simply can’t afford to become complacent now. We must finish the job. Will you chip in $25 to our reelection campaign today? Whatever you are able to afford will go a long way toward helping us build a winning reelection campaign. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks to folks like you who donated time and money to support our party through the midterms -- we are delivering on our agenda. But we’re not done yet. Thanks, Joe Joe Biden

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: TX
body:
Friends -

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to DNC Chairman Jaime Harrison's Dirt Road Democrats PAC. This is an important ask, at an important moment. So please give me a chance to explain why this request matters so much.

Unless that's all you need to hear, in that case, contribute here:

DONATE: https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2817?t=1001&akid=1513%2E4767699%2E4GI-W_

Here is the truth:

If Democrats did just 5% better in rural areas, we would see a huge sea change in our political outcomes and landscape. But too often, those areas are written-off by Democrats. We just don't compete.

But the truth is, people in rural areas are concerned about the cost of prescription drugs, too. They want to retire with dignity. Their states have higher per-capita rates of firearm deaths. They are impacted by climate change, too.

The Dirt Road Democrats are leading the fight to persuade and turnout rural voters this cycle. So please:

Contribute $5 to help them win the mayoral race in Greenville, South Carolina where we have a popular city councilwoman running a winnable race against a 6-term Republican incumbent.

Contribute $5 to help them win in Mississippi where 65 percent of the electorate is young people or people of color. Tate Reeves is one of the most disreputable governor's in America, and we can get him out.

Contribute $5 to help in North Carolina, where Dirt Road Democrats work will stop Republicans from winning a supermajority, where they are currently one vote short.

Contribute $5 to help Dirt Road Democrats' work in rural Virginia where control of both chambers of the state legislature are up-for-grabs.

Please use this link to give. It would mean a lot to me, personally:

Can I count on you to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today to Jaime Harrison's Dirt Road Democrats PAC? It all adds up when we're all chipping-in, and some of these rural races and areas can be impacted by our collective action today.

DONATE: https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2817?t=1002&akid=1513%2E4767699%2E4GI-W_

Thank you in advance for stepping up today. This is critical work to help us win important races in this cycle, and to build an enduring Democratic majority for generations to come. Your help will go a long way.

All my best,

Gavin Newsom

DONATE: https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2817?akid=1513%2E4767699%2E4GI-W_

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.gavinnewsom.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1513%2E4767699%2E4GI-W_

subject: Klobuchar is sounding the alarm!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
Every year, gun violence claims the lives of tens of thousands of Americans.

---
| Peter,

**Amy Klobuchar is sounding the alarm on our need to pass life-saving gun violence prevention legislation →**

Every year, gun violence claims the lives of tens of thousands of Americans.

**Meanwhile, MAGA Republicans rake in tens of thousands of dollars from the NRA and fight every effort to pass gun safety legislation.**

That’s why we’re diligently working to elect gun violence prevention champions at every level of government and pass legislation to stop these tragedies. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: It’s not just wrong. It’s stupid.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Senator Tommy Tuberville’s latest stunt is putting service members, their families, and our national security in jeopardy. Please let me explain:
#
Peter — Senator Tommy Tuberville’s latest stunt isn’t just wrong. It’s stupid.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35257?refcode=em20230723-3433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5)
This email is longer than usual, but I wanted to take a moment today to tell you what’s exactly going on and how it impacts service members, military families, and our national security. **Will you please let me explain?**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35257?refcode=em20230723-3433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5)**
**For the first time in over a century, the United States Marine Corps is without a Commandant — the highest-ranking officer in the Corps.** We're in this situation because Senator Tommy Tuberville has blocked hundreds of military promotions, including the Commandant's.
He claims he’s doing this because government funds have been made available to cover travel for some service members getting abortions. But because I spent 13 years as an active duty Marine and I'm still Lieutenant Colonel in the Reserves, I've been in a lot of conversations about what this means and thought I'd take some time today to lay it out for you.
_As a note, these are my personal observations and may or may not be the same as the Department of Defense._
So first, for a lot of us Marines, this just sucks. Going to the Commandant's house and meeting the Commandant during our initial six-month officer training called The Basic School is one of the highlights of that school.
The same can be said for Marines across the world and at every stage of their training or careers. The Commandant is a big deal for us — someone we look up to, aspire to, and who gives us guidance. So not having a Commandant because some politician in D.C. wants to play games is a morale killer.
But the problem is much bigger than us not having a Commandant. Hundreds of other promotions are backed up with it. **And that doesn't just suck — that has a real impact on our troops and on national security.**
Military life is hard. You move all the time, there's no certainty, there are lots of deployments, you work very long hours, but you do it because you believe in the mission and you believe in the country and taking care of the people who live here.
**And now, because promotions aren't going through, people who've given decades of their lives to this country are being asked or forced to change their plans or not retire.** The one thing they thought they had control over.
People are being frozen in place. They’re not getting the promotion they worked so hard for. Their kids don't know what school they're going to go to next year when the summer ends. Their spouses can't figure out their employment. The list goes on and on, and the impact of that is felt throughout the Corps.
This is wrong. Service members are being used for political leverage, the same way that these politicians recently used us veterans for political leverage by holding up the PACT Act — which takes care of us for burn pit exposure we received in Iraq and Afghanistan. **It's absolutely demoralizing to see them use us like this over and over and over again.**
Senator Tuberville is quite literally punishing military families for things that other people have done that he doesn't like. It's shameful, it's selfish, and I'll be frank, it's stupid because it also damages our national security.
He goes out there and has the nerve to say that promotions and positions don't matter, an acting commander can do just as good a job, and be just as capable with or without the actual nomination going through.
Trust me though, rank and position do matter or they wouldn't exist.
**I learned that myself when I was representing the US in arms control negotiations with NATO allies and Russia from 2016 to 2019.** When you've got American officers with lower ranks going up against generals and admirals in critical meetings and negotiations, that matters.
Our allies, our partners, other countries, and our adversaries notice. Russia and China, they notice.
And now dozens, if not hundreds, of military officers are going to have to explain why the US is sending significantly lower ranks than their counterparts to critical meetings and negotiations around the globe.
When China sends a high-ranking general to meet with a third country and we send a one-star acting commander, that undermines our country, our position, and our national security. It's going to look like we don't care, it's going to look like we aren't serious, and people are going to question our country's resolve.
**Weakening the position of our representatives overseas weakens our national security. Period. And that's exactly what Senator Tuberville is doing.**
We need more folks right now in the media, in Congress, and especially in the Republican Party, to step up and say something — and Senator Tuberville needs to stop putting his personal politics ahead of our troops and ahead of our national security.
These service members, veterans, and their families deserve to have someone looking out for them in the U.S. Senate — and that’s just part of why I’m running to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this seat. But I need your help to do it:
**[So Peter, will you add a donation of whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign today? I don’t take a single cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or defense contractors — so you know I’ll always be a voice for real, everyday people in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35257?refcode=em20230723-3433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35258?refcode=em20230723-3433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35258?refcode=em20230723-3433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35258?refcode=em20230723-3433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35258?refcode=em20230723-3433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35258?refcode=em20230723-3433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35258?refcode=em20230723-3433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35257?refcode=em20230723-3433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5)
---
Thanks for hearing me out,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230723-3433-footer&t=11&refcode2=3433_614464_Tex4P5&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5)**

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3433%2E614464%2ETex4P5). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: BARACK OBAMA ANNOUNCEMENT (via Raja Krishnamoorthi)
subject: STUNNING announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
**[_Please stop what you’re doing and read this, Peter: Barack Obama just called on every single one of us to step up and ensure Democrats WIN this next election. That's why I have to ask: = | = As Washington’s commissioner of public lands, I made a promise to protect our state for future generations. And I never backed down from that promise. Now, I'm running for governor to continue that work – protecting our land, waters, and communities and creating an economy that works for us all. Building early support is critical to prove the strength of our grassroots movement. = | = | = I hope you're with me, –Hilary * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. Peter, it's been over a year since the Supreme Court struck down _Roe v. Wade_ – stripping away reproductive freedom from millions of Americans.
In the time since, we've seen one disastrous decision after another. This ultraconservative majority – stacked with justices appointed by Donald Trump – has handed down rulings that attack LGBTQ+ rights, affirmative action, student loan forgiveness, and so much more.
**This much is clear: The direction of the current Supreme Court is far from the will of the American people.**
In this urgent moment, our mission to get more fierce Democratic women in office who will defend our fundamental rights and safeguard the future of our democracy is as important as ever. That’s why we launched our Gavel In training this year – to train jurists who want to serve in judgeships to run successful and strategic political campaigns. But it's going to take all of us fighting together, side by side.
**That's why we're counting on 53 more Emerge community members – including you – to take a stand alongside us today. So please, before our live poll closes at midnight, tell us: **
**Do you approve of the current Supreme Court?**

name: Read/Act News
subject: Milton Friedman: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | Hi Friend,One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is “equality”, that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | In this [**25-page commentary**](http://trk.readactnews.), "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You’ll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words “created equal” in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You’ll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome.

With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of “equality”, Friedman’s words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

**[Please follow this link to get your free copy of "Created Equal" now.](http://trk.readactnews._SWvI3A)**
Thanks,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

Hi Peter, it’s Senator Tammy Baldwin. When I came out in college, I couldn’t imagine someone like me running for office, let alone winning. But earlier generations paved the way for me and other LGBTQ+ candidates to get to where we are today. **Our stories won’t be erased by right-wing extremists like Ron DeSantis.** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66924704/418039889/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230723_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RlNGVmMDItNzYyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m2yT93u7_MxLNL4UyQHv6XjMo9wXe9qS9U2UGDlDOz8=) As Governor of Florida, DeSantis has signed some of the nation’s most draconian and hateful policies into law — including a book ban targeting stories written by or about LGBTQ+ people. **One of his most recent bans targets a book because it simply mentions that I was the first openly-gay U.S. Senator elected in our nation’s history.** I’ve spent years fighting back against anti-LGBTQ+ extremism from right-wing politicians like DeSantis, and I won’t quit until all LGBTQ+ Americans are free to be who they are and love who they love without fear. Advocating for our rights and freedoms in the U.S. Senate has never been more important. [_**That’s why I’m personally asking you to split a donation between my reelection campaign and HER Time today.
