clean_body: | = Hi Peter, it’s Senator Tammy Baldwin. When I came out in college, I couldn’t imagine someone like me running for office, let alone winning. But earlier generations paved the way for me and other LGBTQ+ candidates to get to where we are today. Our stories won’t be erased by right-wing extremists like Ron DeSantis. = As Governor of Florida, DeSantis has signed some of the nation’s most draconian and hateful policies into law — including a book ban targeting stories written by or about LGBTQ+ people. One of his most recent bans targets a book because it simply mentions that I was the first openly-gay U.S. Senator elected in our nation’s history. I’ve spent years fighting back against anti-LGBTQ+ extremism from right-wing politicians like DeSantis, and I won’t quit until all LGBTQ+ Americans are free to be who they are and love who they love without fear. Advocating for our rights and freedoms in the U.S. Senate has never been more important. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and HER Time will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for stepping up today. Your support means the world to me. — Tammy Baldwin HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Team Rashida
subject: Rashida wants workers to know they have the right to organize in the workplace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Over 30 people attended our labor organizing training and the #1 question we heard was, “when can we do this again?!” | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvhVueNqxsvgC8Xtr4sfwUK6jnaLTfkrJNoLNmf4UZm4avTVqg78FJ65wsuDoL004QwbIjBBYF0lEIvSIAtqN601X7WsKzN2mv8LEEhHZzZ3GvkeGDH_XYq1oWPvXs9jvWEMS-5RevIjqZUj_7kYxO40u_jBigA-VFy1dY8MVEqlL41_SShKvW0zNFtXPcVhoDxsbZKuzWJgg3izjwJCcBFNQdjLIEPFw7SwWGs2AYdOxpOJiCZXwwbAYUUHIGmF-nq-e-fGZ29Ktssv9gWD_OLQ/3y4/3dMDz9xfSnqgrjWRCLTgBA/h0/qZfFwXBfzbLlFaWyTO0Gtap935ITodS56FqCiVmNXeI)
---
Friend, Last weekend, Rashida hosted a training for workers to learn how to organize for their rights in the workplace. Corporate greed is a disease in our country and workers rising up is a pathway to fight back. Across the country, workers are demanding fair pay, safe working conditions, and dignity in the job. But they’re being met with opposition from greedy corporations that are seeking to pad the pockets of CEOs and shareholders while not sharing corporate profits with the workers who make those profits possible. **That’s why Rashida wants workers to have the skills and confidence needed to organize in the workplace and fight back.** 33 people attended the training and the #1 question we heard was, “when can we do this again?!” **Here’s what two of the participants said:**
> _“It was very helpful to learn practical methods to use when organizing and also hearing about people's real life experiences!”_
> _“Very good training and look forward to the other upcoming training sessions.”_
[**Donate today to continue organizing working people in our shared struggle for workers’ rights. Your donation helps pay for the trainers, event space, food, and other costs for future workshops.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yNYIgHyjJCTB05YaIsl8CARZILz09sIlcwFCEIRADLNtgg-2tx1LRQqXvHWLPY-XjfEnxQBDiVyS2lJ1--ByjtHVimf1sw-bgw2s5q_DLouJvucbmV3yEBX9h5kQ28p5PwoX3ZqSb54_paBEF8BhKXpedEH-6SCSseJmP2F0c9IBMaw5OQJlj1grteQcRYr3XRYTCRQz8mRcV_vF9S3g64eWu1lu9DexCh43HFJ5WOoNmVmrM5HLelQY7X4DoHKq20Y5bxACxiWqtKm7EqubT79ZuUgL-almDoUWENuyw2yspbZQbTer2eyVeZBLy66qJZ0ac6t9Rz83USwPM3mP5-kQKxcSVJz7m05BcRDg1hGy8-A6cXLxsNGEfjAXVGDuQnQhk-XIHQV9i5aVjE61z751wsrzRv4VtIRYRf-l1xdYGl4HSVEIwDM3GWWMy5vcM/3y4/3dMDz9xfSnqgrjWRCLTgBA/h1/j-ATL-yruCXHgtqgNkbeRu_nVvO0zhnkA2OQLkbSDME) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yNYIgHyjJCTB05YaIsl8CARZILz09sIlcwFCEIRADLNuyeN5oTmFHE0ZX-bwBiLHLsVswAgngm2S-SdXtkdchMHAZjrQjtF3p1_DFq0u2bmY8EhuhdHGB40Z4vdRSvKCQwhOshdqo_LvULrvy3Q7B5LjXwlacXg-vNjfV2PWFwqZ1qUv8xtwbnK-krQz5TnXXvlxj30WNZbN9XMMJ4lVR56v5X6xiSRdvFSIrVIcyu2tLkQ8a1lCHU8VnlkICC1NI1Q66_lPfY5mOye5A7EzI8RUlIPtrjQvcT-soadhSaqUVxSe8jtULNE5BkpVSC6aExFpvirhlZVi-cKDezAdAJDojMEyqfPzq8XhFTkzJ4BLyAiDpt2p8LIG6nOiJkotYxYKhuq9zhOf1kw4lNetTsOPu08A-O5hxNAvhvDZNQ0gEBVapM7q3ZYToiciS74MQ/3y4/3dMDz9xfSnqgrjWRCLTgBA/h2/dxMUuD8PHagmF6aL_mLrcWN3UtItBXUJPIr9CEg_TEE) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yNYIgHyjJCTB05YaIsl8CARZILz09sIlcwFCEIRADLNpRFyKnGlEeAYexf3B-9FTqE5Vh-gwZIQW1GayquAc-eLFSVdu6-0nZa8YZx5pdVSyVYpPlnuS0wtZTAPXHQaoKx83jsT_ynpjoPvYOtOwsZFlhUp08xDnQRm5-1icfi_pWVSR2_W_o4Vk820DE6bhU3lmrica0JNsXqA-rXvPnjChseYqFhki9-OPN-UMt2lhNd5t31xhDOq8aI3IqTn_81Y6ZRN-XjBOzBdHMLX0P5DZWwsjtbyGGW2v5B72_EPsFa7474KJOaYwqSbM4LGcd0_qHWRvvbJOTLemyn4atGGQadWRWyxP9rJt-jVskkVpsQU3AoupOQLg7PEz1mrQaZOZ3YaRa_ctCStZkB1CZLTwCl2-wpPi7PCZn-j0DTEB72eutRKXVw2gVksxRPyOY/3y4/3dMDz9xfSnqgrjWRCLTgBA/h3/TqqTu-CBS-P-7vqJbHrugq9XVA5DcyH7LYdkYKXyovE)

clean_body: Over 30 people attended our labor organizing training and the #1 question we heard was, “when can we do this again?!” | | | Friend, Last weekend, Rashida hosted a training for workers to learn how to organize for their rights in the workplace. Corporate greed is a disease in our country and workers rising up is a pathway to fight back. Across the country, workers are demanding fair pay, safe working conditions, and dignity in the job. But they’re being met with opposition from greedy corporations that are seeking to pad the pockets of CEOs and shareholders while not sharing corporate profits with the workers who make those profits possible. That’s why Rashida wants workers to have the skills and confidence needed to organize in the workplace and fight back. 33 people attended the training and the #1 question we heard was, “when can we do this again?!” Here’s what two of the participants said: “It was very helpful to learn practical methods to use when organizing and also hearing about people's real life experiences!” “Very good training and look forward to the other upcoming training sessions.” | As the daughter of a United Auto Worker union member, Rashida has seen firsthand the impact the labor movement has had in building our middle class. When Rashida’s father joined the UAW, her family received healthcare for the first time. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Together, we’re fighting for an economy that works for everyday people, not just the wealthy and corporations. -Team Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: John Fetterman
subject: Bob needs your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=341%2E552475%2EZWBDew)
Peter,
I want to share something I’m thinking about a *lot*.
Bob Casey’s Senate seat is gonna be a real toss-up, and the Democratic majority we fought so hard to keep could hinge on what happens in PA in 2024. All eyes are on us as we fight to re-elect Bob.
Don’t just take my word for it — CNN has rated Pennsylvania one of the top 10 competitive Senate seats in the country. That’s why helping Bob and his team reach their upcoming end-of-month fundraising goal is so critical _right now._
**[Peter, if we’re going to defend our control of the Senate, we need your help. Please, can you chip in anything today to help win another term for Bob Casey?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230723-1?refcode=em20230723-1&refcode2=341_552475_ZWBDew&akid=341%2E552475%2EZWBDew)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230723-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230723-1&refcode2=341_552475_ZWBDew&akid=341%2E552475%2EZWBDew)**
Republicans have made it clear that Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, reproductive freedoms, and protections for working families are all on the chopping block if they retake control of the Senate.
We can’t let that happen — there is simply too much on the line. But in order to defend our freedoms and keep the government working for working people, we need momentum on the side of Bob Casey aaaaaall the way to Election Day.
**[So if you can, please, make a donation to reach Bob Casey’s end-of-month goal and send him to another term with me in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230723-1?refcode=em20230723-1&refcode2=341_552475_ZWBDew&akid=341%2E552475%2EZWBDew)**
Online supporters were how we flipped PA blue last year, and I know yinz + youse will come through for Bob this time too! 🙏
Thank you,
💛 John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=341%2E552475%2EZWBDew)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Inslee's failures on mental health
body:
Another Democrat has engaged in sketchy campaign finance schemes while running for higher office. And, as always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62058990:W49vo_DcN:m:1:2610672541:7EF5FC2577BBBF5B139AD4486EE57F51:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, Another Democrat has engaged in sketchy campaign finance schemes while running for higher office. And, as always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... ** ** **This week 's Newsmaker Interview...** In this week's Newsmaker Interview, Representative Joe Schmick (R-Colfax) discussed the recent federal court decision that fined the Inslee Administration $100 million for not providing legally required "competency treatment" for suspected criminals before they stand trial. The court case, known as "Trueblood," revealed that the state failed to provide mental health treatment within the required 21 days, leading to overcrowding in local jails and substantial court fines. Rep. Schmick highlighted the Inslee Administration's broader track record of failures in managing mental health policies, including issues with state hospitals, safety guidelines during COVID, and hiring a felon who later became the prime suspect in theft from patients. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62058991:W49vo_DcN:m:1:2610672541:7EF5FC2577BBBF5B139AD4486EE57F51:r)**.** **This week 's top story...**
Lisa Brown, a former State Commerce Director and state legislator, is running for Spokane Mayor, but her candidacy has been clouded by ethical concerns. Official emails suggest that she might have used state taxpayer money to aid her transition into local government. As there is no precedent for a cabinet-level state employee running for mayor of a major city, questions about the revolving door between public service positions are more than warranted. Local activist and blogger Robin Ball raised concerns about the propriety of Brown seeking the mayoral position after handing out multimillion-dollar contracts to the city during her time as Director of the Department of Commerce. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62058992:W49vo_DcN:m:1:2610672541:7EF5FC2577BBBF5B139AD4486EE57F51:r)**.** **In case you missed it ...**
Last week's Newsmaker Interview featured Steven Strachan, Executive Director of WASPC. Strachan discussed his organization's recent Crime in Washington report. The report indicated a nationwide drop in violent crime rates but highlighted a continued increase in Washington State. Furthermore, the state ranks last in police officers per resident, disproportionately impacting people of color. Strachan emphasized the importance of lawmakers considering these trends when developing future public safety proposals, addressing police recruitment, legislative fixes, and improving law enforcement's capabilities to pursue suspects. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62058993:W49vo_DcN:m:1:2610672541:7EF5FC2577BBBF5B139AD4486EE57F51:r)**.** **This week 's bit of inspiration...** Take a moment to enjoy the beautiful photography of Palouse Falls here in Washington State, courtesy of Former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler. | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62058994:W49vo_DcN:m:1:2610672541:7EF5FC2577BBBF5B139AD4486EE57F51:r)
---
|

If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14254070&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oW49vo_DcN).

clean_body: I’d love to thank you personally for your donation to my campaign. | = Hey there, Peter — I’ll get right to the point: I’m up against a critical public filing deadline — and I have a $40,000 online fundraising goal to hit. = | = = Peter, I’m sure my opponent, Republican Governor Tate Reeves, spends a lot of his time yapping away on the phone. And do you know who has his ear? Special interests. Wealthy donors. Political insiders. That’s not the kind of governor I will be. I promise you: The ONLY folks who will have my ear when I’m Mississippi’s governor are my constituents. But that means I’ve got to work harder and smarter than Tate Reeves (who will sell his soul for a campaign check) to make sure my team has the resources we need to win. And right now, that means working extra hard to hit our critical end-of-month goal. = = = Thank you, Brandon = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. subject: Did you know gerrymandering is driving extremism across the nation?

And with pressing challenges that demand our attention on the rise every day -- **we certainly can’t do this necessary work without you and can’t afford to underestimate the profound impact gerrymandering has on the democratic process in each state.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66925918/418043931/999665525?refcode=20230722_AOTL_F_NCGerry_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5ZTM1MDVjLTdhMjktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kmioOFJ5FTB1bujLf_1VWVZuo61_P9R8K5Q6JLORIjA=)

By manipulating district boundaries, gerrymandering effectively stifles the voice of the people, rendering the vast majority of legislative seats non-competitive. [**The consequence? A landscape where extreme candidates flourish, leaving little room for voters’ voices to be heard.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66925926/418043939/999665525?refcode=20230722_AOTL_F_NCGerry_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5ZTM1MDVjLTdhMjktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kmioOFJ5FTB1bujLf_1VWVZuo61_P9R8K5Q6JLORIjA=)
This troubling situation is not just a mere inconvenience; it poses a significant threat to the values and principles that make states like North Carolina vibrant and diverse. Extremist representatives elected in gerrymandered districts are less accountable to the will of the people and are more likely to prioritize their own partisan agendas over the needs of the broader community.
[**Make a donation to All On The Line to put a stop to gerrymandering. >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66925927/418043940/999665525?refcode=20230722_AOTL_F_NCGerry_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5ZTM1MDVjLTdhMjktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kmioOFJ5FTB1bujLf_1VWVZuo61_P9R8K5Q6JLORIjA=)

We must act now to dismantle the undemocratic practice of gerrymandering and restore balance in our democracy. The consequences of inaction are dire, and the effects will be felt for generations to come.
It is only through the collective efforts of supporters like you that we can achieve a truly representative and fair democracy.
In solidarity,
Emuni Sanderson
Mobilization Strategist

| | 20% of voters are still undecided. Here's what that means: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66926009/418044005/-100368209?sourceid=1051512&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2UzNTA1Yy03YTI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BEbUcW7Jac3P83YJW1IjU4uwpyWeolCNUM3ArUiCVX8=&emci=71938e75-f527-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=93e3505c-7a29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934) We've got an update out of Michigan, Peter:

In the latest polling for the 2024 Michigan Senate race, Rep. **Elissa Slotkin** holds a _**very small lead**_ over her likely Republican opponent. But the most interesting — and important — finding is that **20% of voters are still undecided** in this race. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66926010/418044006/-100368209?sourceid=1051512&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2UzNTA1Yy03YTI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BEbUcW7Jac3P83YJW1IjU4uwpyWeolCNUM3ArUiCVX8=&emci=71938e75-f527-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=93e3505c-7a29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934) When we hear a figure like that, our game plan is clear: we've got to spend the next 15 months reaching every single one of those undecided voters and persuading them to protect reproductive rights and support Elissa Slotkin. **Our Senate majority (not to mention our right to bodily autonomy) depends on it.**

What does that kind of outreach look like? It looks like a robust, well-staffed field program; it looks like a strong digital presence across every platform; it looks like effective and frequent TV ads in every corner of the state. (At EMILYs List, we're not just helping to fund these projects in Michigan — we're doing it all across the country.) **When you donate to EMILYs List, you're giving pro-choice candidates like Elissa a much-needed head start in some tough races — and you're giving Democrats a leg up in the fight to hold onto the Senate majority. We can't do _any_ of it without you, so please, chip in now:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-More-Women-This-Month](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66926017/418044013/-100368209?sourceid=1051512&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2UzNTA1Yy03YTI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BEbUcW7Jac3P83YJW1IjU4uwpyWeolCNUM3ArUiCVX8=&emci=71938e75-f527-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=93e3505c-7a29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934)** Thanks,

name: Barbara Boxer via Blue Amp Action
subject: Infuriating
body:
Democrats must win this district
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb528d9ec-6da9-4808-ae99-5223be33e234/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9e4fa7a-c452-4c83-951a-3e56e7fac178/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, this is infuriating. We watched Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA allies try to censure and sue a sitting Democrat for daring to hold Donald Trump accountable. If that's not enough, extremists like Lauren Boebert are now pushing Congress to impeach President Joe Biden. Let’s be clear: these folks aren't interested in governing. What they are interested in is weakening our President. What they are interested in is attacking women's rights, banning books, and making it harder for working families to get by in this country. That’s why I'm fighting so hard to take back our majority, and an important step you can take to join me is making sure Will Rollins has the funds he needs to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st District. Flipping five House seats in the coming election puts Democrats back in control. Will is running in a "must-win" district that almost went blue in 2022. [Before Will's next fundraising deadline, split a donation of $10, or whatever you can afford, between Blue Amp Action and Will’s campaign to stop Republicans from destroying everything we've worked so hard to build. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1f9241e-a1bb-468f-9e90-9fdbfb0265ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T922dbf14-e0b6-462e-b2c0-54e46be769a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’m proud of what Democrats have accomplished:

– The creation of more jobs in two years than any other president in history.
– Created 13 million jobs in President Biden's first term.
– Enacted the Child Tax Credit which cut child poverty in half.
– Made life-saving vaccines available to every American.
– And much more... We've made incredible progress, but Republicans in the House will stop at nothing to put a halt to our work. I refuse to stand for it and you shouldn't either.
[That's why I need you to split a contribution of $ask between Blue Amp Action and Will's campaign before his next deadline hits. We can’t afford to fall short -- not with so much at stake. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0403997-f1cf-44a6-972f-a547241a616b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc4393ff-311f-4d34-aa87-8ad8ca4cdd71/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Thanks,_ _Barbara Boxer _ _Former U.S. Senator, California_
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/barbaraboxerforwillrollins6-n_copy1_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d965fdad-0a93-4bf4-b43a-42ef2de15a05&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d965fdad-0a93-4bf4-b43a-42ef2de15a05&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Future Forum Democrats
subject: The world’s biggest heat record
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:
Climate change is getting worse. We have to act. name: Anna Kaplan
subject: George Santos + Donald Trump = birds of a feather
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress running against
George Santos.

Like Donald Trump, my opponent calls himself an “America-first
Republican.”

Both Santos and Trump claim the 2020 election was stolen -- despite not
having any evidence. 🤔

They’re both anti-choice, pro-gun, radical right-wing lunatics.

And now, they’re both under criminal indictment and are running for office
to avoid jail time.

We can’t let them win.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19002?t=1001&akid=3416%2E346206%2ELzhTbv ]Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles Booker -- to help
me DEFEAT George Santos and restore honesty and integrity to the U.S.
Congress?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19002?t=1002&akid=3416%2E346206%2ELzhTbv ][IMG]

Trump and Santos are birds of a feather. Let’s defeat them together.

Thanks for your support,

Anna Kaplan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230723-3416-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3416_346206_LzhTbv&akid=3416%2E346206%2ELzhTbv

We watched Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA allies try to censure and sue a sitting Democrat for daring to hold Donald Trump accountable. If that's not enough, extremists like Lauren Boebert are now pushing Congress to impeach President Joe Biden. Let’s be clear: these folks aren't interested in governing. What they are interested in is weakening our President. What they are interested in is attacking women's rights, banning books, and making it harder for working families to get by in this country. That’s why I'm fighting so hard to take back our majority, and an important step you can take to join me is making sure Will Rollins has the funds he needs to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st District. clean_body: | | Team, 2023 is shaping up to be a MAJOR year for ballot measures. In fact, 90 more ballot measures have been filed across the country than the odd-year national average. Why? Because ballot measures are a massively effective way to enact progressive change. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Come on Barbie, let’s go govern ✨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
_To learn more about the Lil’ Gretch digital campaign, please check out “_[ _Gretchen Whitmer Would Like You to Meet ‘Governor Barbie_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66928895/418048741/1580568979?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20230723_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDA4YmQ3ZGMtN2QyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pDTnk_jYNsco8z0uD-14bcRFTgezXyFbJx8aCT9YWp0=&emci=627313da-a228-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=008bd7dc-7d29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=1028753) _,” originally published in The New York Times on July 20, 2023. _
* * *
Dear friends, What a week it’s been. You probably saw we had a little fun along the way as well... If you haven’t met her yet, I’m thrilled to introduce “Governor Barbie,” aka “Lil’ Gretch,” as my team likes to call her. Just like other women leaders, Lil’ Gretch hasn’t let anything get in the way of getting things done. She spent time at our state capitol, working alongside our new Democratic legislature (elected thanks to your support!). Next, she held a press conference to discuss our historic education budget, signed into law this week. It provides free breakfast and lunch to all public school students in Michigan, expands free pre-K, and invests the most money in your kid in Michigan history. It saves parents thousands of dollars, and precious time every morning. From preschool to postsecondary, there's something in our bipartisan education budget for _everyone. _ **_(Did you know I’ve signed over 1,000 bipartisan bills? We’re unstoppable with your support!)_ ** Lil’ Gretch even took a road trip in an iconic Michigan Chevrolet to check out how we’re fixing the damn roads! From Ann Arbor to Escanaba, we're fixing tens of thousands of lane miles so it's easier to cruise through the Great Lakes State and turn every journey into an adventure. 💕 This week was fun. But in all seriousness, we’re fighting like hell to build a world that empowers women to show up as they are and allow them to lead from the front. **It’s on all of us to create systems and structures that allow more people to achieve their own dreams,_no matter who they are, what they look like, or what they wear._ ** **That’s what this week was all about.** We're going to have fun. We're going to continue to be fierce and feminine... in our fuchsia. 🙂 So let's keep leaning into our power as women, shatter stereotypes, and uplift one another. Together, we'll create a future where everyone can shine bright. The world is our runway, and with our collective power, we'll make it more fabulous and inclusive for all. With gratitude, Gretchen and (Lil’ Gretch ;) P.S. I’d be honored if you’d support our fight to get things done that will make a difference in people’s lives right now. [**Chip in today to help power this work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66928900/418048743/490338806?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20230723_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDA4YmQ3ZGMtN2QyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pDTnk_jYNsco8z0uD-14bcRFTgezXyFbJx8aCT9YWp0=) | | **[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66928901/418048747/2140481003?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20230723_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDA4YmQ3ZGMtN2QyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pDTnk_jYNsco8z0uD-14bcRFTgezXyFbJx8aCT9YWp0=)**

name: Team Tina
subject: Tough fights ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We can’t do this without your help. |
#
Team — It’s no secret that Senate Democrats have a tough map in next year’s election. _CNN_ and _Cook Political Report_ have written at length about how Democrats are on defense — and with only two seats separating Mitch McConnell from the Senate Majority, there’s no telling how much he’ll spend to take back control for the GOP. Folks, it’s going to be an uphill battle in states like Pennsylvania, Ohio, Montana, and Wisconsin. **But rest assured that Tina is hard at work as Vice Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee.** She’s building a roadmap to hold onto _(and expand!)_ the Democratic Senate majority across the country. Tina’s no stranger to tough fights, and this is no exception. **But she can’t do this without your help. name: Working Families Party
subject: We wanted to take a moment to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
When we join together in numbers, we know we are unstoppable. | | | Peter — We wanted to take a moment to thank you for all you do as a member of the Working Families Party. **The Working Families Party is regular people, coming together across our differences, to make a better future for us all.** We’re the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for our freedoms and to build a nation that cares for all of us. And when we join together in numbers, we know we are unstoppable. At the Working Families Party, our long-term vision is of a society rooted in equality, dignity, solidarity, and compassion. But we know that in order to take on the enemies of progress and win, we are going to need to build real governing power by and for the multiracial working class. **Working Families Party members across the country help to power essential programs to identify, recruit and train working class candidates** — and help make sure we have the resources to beat back corporate donors when they spend millions to try and defeat us. [**One way our members help build the party is by making a monthly contribution of $10 or more:**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zyGedSDatGvOc2TOWAciXdT43uoLIvcqOde17OxzbVi1qiPSTMVX1__G0TIIxd16BkDig9jUPyl28ufjcXwqBTZhlwOSayne9une8y9OyApqLQ0nt0UuY5R20pF6E1H2BjtYND1SaeXS5KWt9Zm5aShPQ_80f5TDod0_d7LQbH9JTymVDYGV5Obnp42yF-vh6wIg12nUQTBTvpbfTGXeIErbaFuSD4zvHaYfu25AuFFBP7b_94sRcLC4PwNsz9PvCsWIawolYQufs4v2QDYlmVdAPqgbb4bxYpKZJSYkqlrbjBnlj93TWV00FWdZ2Gb9WdjA-Zg8B-0xxzHK3vZnn6b5iFTmLHWVstoOq0Qq8xO4vCh7SYPibVb-41SrMKvfDyVV295qWbxFfAVA3LOTXzhCCqr-aJRh3A88bZVJwhjw/3y4/fAfrfQXbSE6dbHat0BMytA/h0/Le4sX9Yfj1cO9XwlPf62nrnHfyY2zov120ieWO3BKgE) clean_body: When we join together in numbers, we know we are unstoppable. | | | Peter — We wanted to take a moment to thank you for all you do as a member of the Working Families Party. The Working Families Party is regular people, coming together across our differences, to make a better future for us all. We’re the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for our freedoms and to build a nation that cares for all of us. And when we join together in numbers, we know we are unstoppable. At the Working Families Party, our long-term vision is of a society rooted in equality, dignity, solidarity, and compassion. But we know that in order to take on the enemies of progress and win, we are going to need to build real governing power by and for the multiracial working class. Working Families Party members across the country help to power essential programs to identify, recruit and train working class candidates — and help make sure we have the resources to beat back corporate donors when they spend millions to try and defeat us. You can always learn more what we're up to by following us on our social media channels including , , , and . Or, if you would prefer to opt out of being a WFP member and stop receiving future emails from us, just . In solidarity, The Working Families Party team Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Kim Nguyen
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | My team just showed me all the generous gifts from our grassroots supporters for my birthday and I’m incredibly touched and grateful for all of your generosity.

If we win this election, I will be a Congresswoman at just 33 years old – that’s 25 years younger than the average member of Congress.

Being the youngest person in the room isn’t new to me. At just 25, I became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council, where I’ve been proud to fight for my community.

I’m running for Congress to address the issues that are facing young families and working people across CA-45. We need representatives who reflect our values and are looking out for our futures.

Thank you again for your birthday gifts. I’m so grateful to have such an amazing team!

— Kim | | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66936251/418052300/764484201?contactdata=Ie+pxjhbH3QA9Bk0m9AM0erVBV0/wErdNZ//XvHiMGGvzVuQiiICFCn80CCYg+tbYcdmnifCRsaAB7kpE4qElYOCzAU3GBAosxCtt2bZboM=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230723_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQzODliYmUtODIyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PeCRWHZoKripbnyzFAGe7WBAhVa5T7D3pvgLsoMjUBs=)**

| **Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy.

We will make this brief. A lot is happening right now, so we can't waste even a second beating around the bush.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark?=
subject: 🔥 GFI "Call to Action" - an Ohioan in need! 🔥
body:
🔥 GFI "Call to Action" \- an Ohioan in need! 🔥 | | |
---
| |
# HELP!
---
| Greetings!

As you know, the DOJ and FBI are stepping up their persecution of January 6, 2021 (J6) civil protesters, and they are now targeting Trevor Cain, who went to Washington as part of a day bus trip.

Trevor is a young husband and father of 2, and there is a fundraiser for Trevor on Friday, July 28 from 7 to 10 PM in Parma, Ohio (see attached flyer and information below for details). He will need around $30,000 to mount a successful defense!

Please forward this email to your friends & family and ask them to attend if possible! Also, I know many of you are not in the Cleveland area, so if you cannot attend, please consider donating to his defense at:

[https://givesendgo.com/trevorcain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ebfdfd7446&e=5c740fa3e2)

This isn't just about Trevor; it is about the future of our country, and it is about your personal freedom and liberty because they are going to persecute all who will not comply with tyranny regardless of whether we went to J6.

The more we resist and push back against the Deep State NOW, the more they will know they cannot beat us!

---
| [Visit GFI's Website](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a4538a3299&e=5c740fa3e2 "Visit GFI's Website")
---
| **How Can You Help GFI?**
You can help GFI by inviting your friends & family to become part of our **network**. You can forward them this email and ask them to:

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6961795bcc&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| If you want to text an invite to someone, just cut and paste this into a text or email):

I'm a part of the Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI) network. Please accept my invitation to join me.

Together, through GFI, people like us across Ohio are building the largest, off-grid, network of Ohio patriots. Just click the link below to get started!

Thanks!

[http://eepurl.com/h1wIZ5](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bed97e92b1&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
GFIOhio@proton.me
614-499-0599 (c)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2023 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=ed76d398cf) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=ed76d398cf).

name: Colin Allred
subject: Inside Elections just downgraded Ted Cruz's chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.
They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.
And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.
Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"!
Friend, all of these experts are putting Ted Cruz on notice because of the early strength of our grassroots campaign – but you know that GOP donors are taking notice, too. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Serve America to help fight back against the GOP, beat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? I need to raise $100,000 today → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority.
But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back.
That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let's do this.
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Here's what I've been up to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
... nothing makes me prouder than to be called an effective lawmaker. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66937934/418055701/279091928?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230723_fr_effective_cand_nc_openers_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2ZlN2FkNi04NDI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LM4umjFgadr4OPq3-eElrywrX_eMRF9_WwlRcaNHaVs=)
---
Listen, I’ve been called many things in my life, but nothing makes me prouder than being called an effective lawmaker. Just a few weeks ago, the Delaware General Assembly wrapped up its final week of the legislative session. During the session, I proudly championed and helped pass significant legislation to improve the lives of **_all_** Delawareans, including: ✔️ Gun safety reforms,
✔️ Historic investments in lead poisoning prevention and remediation,
✔️ The nation’s best anti-corruption law,
✔️ Protections for DREAMers and other undocumented workers,
✔️ Investments in clean energy, and
✔️ Expanded access to health care. **That’s on top of paid family and medical leave last year.** I’m not afraid of rolling up my sleeves and putting in the hard work to deliver for Delawareans. And that's exactly the same work ethic I'll take to Congress, if elected. **Now, here’s the part where I have to do something I don’t really love doing: asking for donations.** Unfortunately, running for Congress takes a lot (seriously, it's a lot) of money. And we're investing early — right now, 13 months out from the primary — in our organizing efforts. clean_body: ... nothing makes me prouder than to be called an effective lawmaker. | = Listen, I’ve been called many things in my life, but nothing makes me prouder than being called an effective lawmaker. Just a few weeks ago, the Delaware General Assembly wrapped up its final week of the legislative session. During the session, I proudly championed and helped pass significant legislation to improve the lives of all Delawareans, including: ✔️ Gun safety reforms, ✔️ Historic investments in lead poisoning prevention and remediation, ✔️ The nation’s best anti-corruption law, ✔️ Protections for DREAMers and other undocumented workers, ✔️ Investments in clean energy, and ✔️ Expanded access to health care. That’s on top of paid family and medical leave last year. I’m not afraid of rolling up my sleeves and putting in the hard work to deliver for Delawareans. And that's exactly the same work ethic I'll take to Congress, if elected. Now, here’s the part where I have to do something I don’t really love doing: asking for donations. Unfortunately, running for Congress takes a lot (seriously, it's a lot) of money. And we're investing early — right now, 13 months out from the primary — in our organizing efforts. = We'll be in North Wilmington and Milton soon, talking to voters about issues that matter to them — and how I can have their back in Congress. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks! Sarah ** **** | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. First of all, Ted Cruz is horrible and deserves to be soundly defeated in 2024. That's a given. We're all on the same page there.
But also, Ted Cruz is VULNERABLE this election cycle.
Remember - he won his last election by just 2.6 points. Democrats were SO close.
And this time, Texas Dems have a strong candidate with a history of beating incumbent Republicans.
On top of that? Pundits and political experts agree that Texas is one of the most flippable Senate seats this year.

| | |
# PARTY OF THE CONSTITUTION
---
| | This weaponizing of the AG office against Republicans is a symptom of a more significant governmental and political disease that, if not cured, will manifest in ever-increasing threats against our children and grandchildren inheriting freedom.

Whether it’s several other patriots and myself being illicitly fined $58,000 for filing a lawsuit against the corrupt Detroit clerk and Board of Elections Inspectors after the judge refused to hear our evidence, illicit prosecutions against President Trump, or parents demonized as "domestic terrorists" for lawfully opposing their children being indoctrinated with anti-American and pornographic images in school. Or, just recently, the illicit prosecutions of MI electors by aspiring-tyrant Dana Nessel. It's part of a pattern made all the more problematic by the increasing frequency of government being weaponized against the people it is obligated to serve.

It all began over a century ago as individuals within both the Democrat and Republican parties slowly drifted toward globalist-driven totalitarianism as both parties maintained equal distance from each other. Gradually, the once "JFK-liberal" Democrat party moved from liberalism to now being a fascist-Marxist-hybrid. Simultaneously, the GOP moved from using the constitution, and Judeo-Christian defined morality as its measures for internal party accountability, electability, and governing to being the party of constitutional and moral relativism being acceptable as long as doing so is necessary to "beat Democrats."

Abandoning our obligation before God by ensuring the blessing of America is preserved, and our children inherit usable God-given unalienable rights is seriously threatened.
**_We must lawfully resist tyranny._**
This is why "The Good Neighbor Program" was created. It is a community organizing operation networked statewide that will roll into our GOTV program. The Good Neighbor Program is a vehicle for the MIGOP programs that begin contacting millions of would-be Republicans throughout Michigan whom previous administrations never reached. And after individual relationships are built between the people of the party has never been contacted and our county and district Republican Party networks throughout the state, trust will be restored, activism spun up, donations pouring in, and the GOP pool of voters will expand like ever before.

Community organizing represents enormous possibilities for socially and politically reengineering local communities and entire nations. It can be used for great good or great evil.

Saul Alinsky, who wrote "Rules for Radicals," the playbook for the aspiring-tyrants having infiltrated political parties throughout America, thanked his mentor Lucifer at the beginning of his book and then went about the business of writing a training manual for how to organize those who would destroy the nation so it could be rebuilt consistent with atheistic totalitarianism and collectivism.

Barack Obama has always been an aspiring tyrant posing as a liberal and got away with it by using his charismatic personality to engage in community organizing. When Barak Obama ran for President, most Republicans laughed at his background, but look how effective he was at paralyzing Republican Party operations that should have been opposing his attempt to deconstruct America so it could be rebuilt consistent with his totalitarian worldview. This is a pattern amongst aspiring tyrants. They always use the pretense of good intentions to infiltrate spheres of power and influence, where they then begin sabotaging nations until the nations degenerate into bloody chaos, followed by the aspiring tyrants offering themselves up as the "saviors" who will stop the bloodshed. This strategy was evidenced in the French Revolution, where enlightened humanism was forced upon the populous. At the same time, Christians were beheaded and tortured, and they are attempting it here in America now.

Thankfully, these aspiring tyrants are not the only ones good at community organizing. Moreover, because we have truth as the basis for our community organizing, while they are limited to lies, manipulation, and deception, our community organizing has the potential to be far more productive. Creating results to the extent those results redirect Michigan's path from engineered ruin to restoration. This allows us to win the hearts and minds necessary to save our children’s future.

Effective community organizing and other strategies and tactics are how we grow our ranks and lawfully take back our state!

MIGOP has begun Good Neighbor program trainings with State Committee members and county and district chairs. And now we need more delegates like you to become a Good Neighbor leader.

The Good Neighbor Program allows us to build relationships with those in our community we do not know but who will unite with us once they understand that we are to be trusted and that "The party of the Constitution," as stated in our national platform, is the only political party capable of bringing them security and prosperity through equal opportunity for all.

And with the alternative being, aspiring-tyrants posing as 'liberals' who deceptively claim to pursue "equality," though the only 'equality' they've historically created has been "equality of tyranny for all, except for the ruling elite who lead lives of privilege."
**_The time to lawfully take back Michigan so our children and grandchildren inherit freedom from us is NOW!_**
Please join us for the next virtual training session on **__TUESDAY, July 25th @ 7 PM__** and become a Good Neighbor Program leader! Each virtual program leader session trains 100 people max per session, so make sure you register to get a spot.
[https://us06web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZMuceGqpzouHNI6xwWigKazu644TxDx_0We](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=5b2739f9fd&e=a2af77507c)
Also, many county and district chairs are requesting Good Neighbor training sessions. If you would like your chair to set up a training in your county, please get in touch with our trainers.

Ken Beyer - 616-218-8590 or [kenbeyer@protonmail.com](mailto:kenbeyer@protonmail.com)

Ann Clark - 313-590-7493 or [ann@annpatriot.com](mailto:ann@annpatriot.com)

name: Adam Frisch
subject: a few reasons why I’m running against Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
When I decided to throw my hat in the ring against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I knew what I was signing up for. I’ll admit, I never expected it to get that nasty... But I believed from the start that we could win, despite all the naysayers.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66938446/418057486/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjE4MjBmZi04NzI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yX4lDm66aVjOwmb5gQou5hv9q8Xvrw5WzQlrp-Cix7M=&emci=1ed249f1-8629-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=f21820ff-8729-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66938447/418057487/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjE4MjBmZi04NzI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yX4lDm66aVjOwmb5gQou5hv9q8Xvrw5WzQlrp-Cix7M=&emci=1ed249f1-8629-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=f21820ff-8729-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
When I decided to throw my hat in the ring against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I knew what I was signing up for. I’ll admit, I never expected it to get _that_ nasty... But I believed from the start that we could win, despite all the naysayers.
In the end, though, we fell 546 votes short of defeating Boebert – just over one vote per precinct.
Now, I’m running again, and here are just a few of the reasons why:
1. The people of Western and Southern Colorado are tired of the circus in Washington, and Lauren Boebert is one of the ringmasters.

Boebert and her ‘extreme caucus’ peddle in fueling an _angertainment_ industry – one more focused on generating headlines than actually solving people’s problems. And voters are sick of it.

2. Democrats, Republicans, and Independents are all ready for a change. Every day, I meet Republican voters out on the trail who tell me they’re going to cast their ballot for me instead of Boebert.

Because Boebert wants to ban all abortions nationwide – even in cases of rape, incest, or the life of the mother. Because she is everything that's wrong with Washington. And because she cares more about Lauren Boebert than creating jobs or fixing the water crisis in our state.

It’s clear that Lauren Boebert is in big trouble in 2024.

3. I believe, simply, that there is too much at stake for me to sit this one out. The last campaign was hard on our family – especially our two kids. No one wants to turn on the TV or go on social media and see vicious lies being told about you.

But when I think about what happened on January 6th... when I travel the district and see how Boebert has left people without anyone advocating for them in Congress... I had to run again. Especially when we came so close to winning last time.

**If you’re in this with me, and if you believe that we can defeat Lauren Boebert – that we _must_ defeat Lauren Boebert – then I’m humbly asking:** [**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – any amount you can afford – to help me send Lauren Boebert packing? I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so every dollar goes a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66938448/418057488/1610638071?refcode=em20230723pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=f21820ff-8729-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjE4MjBmZi04NzI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yX4lDm66aVjOwmb5gQou5hv9q8Xvrw5WzQlrp-Cix7M=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: When I decided to throw my hat in the ring against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I knew what I was signing up for. I’ll admit, I never expected it to get that nasty... But I believed from the start that we could win, despite all the naysayers. Hello, When I decided to throw my hat in the ring against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I knew what I was signing up for. I’ll admit, I never expected it to get that nasty... But I believed from the start that we could win, despite all the naysayers. In the end, though, we fell 546 votes short of defeating Boebert – just over one vote per precinct. Now, I’m running again, and here are just a few of the reasons why: 1. The people of Western and Southern Colorado are tired of the circus in Washington, and Lauren Boebert is one of the ringmasters. Boebert and her ‘extreme caucus’ peddle in fueling an angertainment industry – one more focused on generating headlines than actually solving people’s problems. And voters are sick of it. 2. Democrats, Republicans, and Independents are all ready for a change. Every day, I meet Republican voters out on the trail who tell me they’re going to cast their ballot for me instead of Boebert. Because Boebert wants to ban all abortions nationwide – even in cases of rape, incest, or the life of the mother. Because she is everything that's wrong with Washington. And because she cares more about Lauren Boebert than creating jobs or fixing the water crisis in our state. It’s clear that Lauren Boebert is in big trouble in 2024. 3. I believe, simply, that there is too much at stake for me to sit this one out. The last campaign was hard on our family – especially our two kids. No one wants to turn on the TV or go on social media and see vicious lies being told about you. But when I think about what happened on January 6th... when I travel the district and see how Boebert has left people without anyone advocating for them in Congress... I had to run again. Especially when we came so close to winning last time. If you’re in this with me, and if you believe that we can defeat Lauren Boebert – that we must defeat Lauren Boebert – then I’m humbly asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = From the bottom of my heart: Thank you so much for being a part of this campaign. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

💖 **Republicans only need to flip two seats to take control of the Senate,** and they’ve already made it clear that Wisconsin is a top target.
💖 We can’t afford a summer slump. If we want to defend our Democratic Senate majority next fall, **we can’t fall short on a single fundraising deadline.**
💖 One of those deadlines is right around the corner. Our critical **end-of-month deadline is July 31st,** and we could really use your help!

name: Tamie
subject: Abortion is on the ballot right now in Ohio
body:
Ohio’s August 8 statewide referendum is an attack on abortion rights.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66938522/418057875/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzIxM2U4NmEtODkyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gS43VcrT5AYpsknptbowFbwinUUCKpfBe8j7hYqIPD4=)
---
| | Friend, Ohio is the next battleground for the fight to keep right wing extremists out of our reproductive healthcare decisions and out of our bedrooms.

On August 8, voters across the state will vote on a vaguely-worded referendum that would increase the threshold of the total vote needed to amend the state constitution from a simple majority to a 60% supermajority. **“Issue 1” is designed to undermine democracy and thwart the will of the majority in Ohio.**

But make no mistake, what’s actually on the ballot in this August special election is much more than how Ohioans amend their state Constitution: **_abortion rights are the true target of this underhanded campaign_**. Republicans are using this playbook in every state and they must be stopped. This anti-democratic campaign is being funded by GOP anti-abortion activists and out-of-state right wing billionaires in a clumsy attempt to make it more difficult for voters to enshrine abortion rights protections directly into the Ohio state Constitution.**

I pledge to do everything that I can to protect abortion rights and rally the voters of my district to defeat this insidious proposal on August 8.** [And I am asking you to stand with me and help support my campaign’s efforts to fire Jim Jordan. I vow to fight for abortion rights across America—will you please join me and help fuel our urgent work with a contribution of $25 or more to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66938523/418057876/-20832958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzIxM2U4NmEtODkyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gS43VcrT5AYpsknptbowFbwinUUCKpfBe8j7hYqIPD4=&emci=85df442f-8729-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=c213e86a-8929-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=10450908)

clean_body: Ohio’s August 8 statewide referendum is an attack on abortion rights.| | | = | | Friend, Ohio is the next battleground for the fight to keep right wing extremists out of our reproductive healthcare decisions and out of our bedrooms. On August 8, voters across the state will vote on a vaguely-worded referendum that would increase the threshold of the total vote needed to amend the state constitution from a simple majority to a 60% supermajority. “Issue 1” is designed to undermine democracy and thwart the will of the majority in Ohio. But make no mistake, what’s actually on the ballot in this August special election is much more than how Ohioans amend their state Constitution: abortion rights are the true target of this underhanded campaign. Republicans are using this playbook in every state and they must be stopped. This anti-democratic campaign is being funded by GOP anti-abortion activists and out-of-state right wing billionaires in a clumsy attempt to make it more difficult for voters to enshrine abortion rights protections directly into the Ohio state Constitution. I pledge to do everything that I can to protect abortion rights and rally the voters of my district to defeat this insidious proposal on August 8. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = = | = = | | Donate= The way we defeat corrupt politicians like Jim Jordan and their repressive social agenda is by coming together from across the country and standing in solidarity against them. I am proud to count you as a friend and supporter, and thank you for being in the fight! In Solidarity, -Tamie | = To contribute via check, please address to: 273 SARATOGA ST. name: Shawn Wilson
subject: Asking one more time (not about $$$)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I really need your input here.

Peter, I have to ask one more time before we check the results tomorrow: **_[Will you take just 30 seconds to fill out my issues survey and let us know what’s on your mind?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66938639/418058854/1334995027?refcode=ea.20215722-8b29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.20215722-8b29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjAyMTU3MjItOGIyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9GcLcXhqJHIJQ9hP7Mlm-iWk4orYRIyLA44kRxzJ9WM=&emci=9e1c3ab5-fe27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=20215722-8b29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=13775345)_** Since we’re closing the survey at midnight, I’m hoping to reach a few more folks to get their input about which “kitchen table” issues are at the top of their mind. And it could be anything: housing, transportation, healthcare...everything is fair game because we’re committed to putting working Louisianans first. But right now, we’re short on time _and_ responses. We still need about 1,500 more responses to get a better understanding of where folks’ concerns lie, and there are only a few hours left to submit. **_[So please, Peter, fill out my survey and share your thoughts with my team and me. With your help, we can run a winning campaign that best reflects the needs of Louisianans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66938640/418058856/1334995027?refcode=ea.20215722-8b29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.20215722-8b29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjAyMTU3MjItOGIyOS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9GcLcXhqJHIJQ9hP7Mlm-iWk4orYRIyLA44kRxzJ9WM=&emci=9e1c3ab5-fe27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=20215722-8b29-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=13775345)_** Thanks, Shawn Wilson
**\----Original Message----**
**From:** Shawn Wilson
**Date:** Jul 12, 2023
**Subject:** Got a second, Peter? I need your input
> Peter, it’s no secret that election-winning campaigns are built upon a strong foundation of shared values, ideas, and aspirations — something I take very seriously as I campaign for Governor of Louisiana. Because I know that from New Orleans to Shreveport, Louisianans have a multitude of priorities that they’re counting on our next Governor to tackle. But since we can’t reach everyone on the campaign trail, I want to give folks the opportunity to give me their feedback directly. **That's why I need your input today.** **_[Will you share your thoughts on the key issues you believe Louisiana’s next Governor should prioritize? clean_body: I really need your input here. Peter, I have to ask one more time before we check the results tomorrow: Since we’re closing the survey at midnight, I’m hoping to reach a few more folks to get their input about which “kitchen table” issues are at the top of their mind. And it could be anything: housing, transportation, healthcare...everything is fair game because we’re committed to putting working Louisianans first. But right now, we’re short on time and responses. We still need about 1,500 more responses to get a better understanding of where folks’ concerns lie, and there are only a few hours left to submit. Thanks, Shawn Wilson \----Original Message---- From: Shawn Wilson Date: Jul 12, 2023 Subject: Got a second, Peter? I need your input Peter, it’s no secret that election-winning campaigns are built upon a strong foundation of shared values, ideas, and aspirations — something I take very seriously as I campaign for Governor of Louisiana. Because I know that from New Orleans to Shreveport, Louisianans have a multitude of priorities that they’re counting on our next Governor to tackle. But since we can’t reach everyone on the campaign trail, I want to give folks the opportunity to give me their feedback directly. That's why I need your input today. Peter, your input today will help us design policies and initiatives that genuinely reflect our state’s needs. Thanks for taking the time to chime in. \- Shawn Wilson = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. name: Chrissy
subject: I’m still fighting alongside the president
body:
I’ve stood alongside Joe Biden and Kamala Harris since the beginning of their historic term in office...
| | |
---
Derek, I’ve stood alongside Joe Biden and Kamala Harris since the beginning of their historic term in office. Now, as a member of their reelection campaign’s National Advisory Board, I’m more confident than ever in President Biden’s strong leadership.
In May, my community saw the lowest unemployment rate in the Commonwealth – a direct result of the president’s economic plan that’s cut the inflation rate in half (in half!) in the past year. We’re seeing construction crews at work on overdue transportation and infrastructure projects. Amid so much polarization and misinformation, President Biden is continuing to deliver on the issues that matter most to the majority of Americans. He has:
* strengthened access to contraception following the Dobbs decision
* overseen a historically low rate of those without health insurance
* safeguarded marriage equality amid persistent right-wing attacks
* signed into law the first major piece of gun safety legislation in three decades
* and so much more!

**Derek, President Biden and I are fighting for the same team — team USA – and we’re both depending on your grassroots support to keep us all moving in the direction of progress. **[**So please, will you invest in the president’s reelection early and donate? Your support right now will lay the foundation for a movement that can win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66938729/418058958/-1057137989?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTIxNTcyMi04YjI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eR0Zp0yuQ7CG10_tijjwCxAGaAK6-HcYvmVnnstG448=)
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66938730/418058959/-1057137989?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk847-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTIxNTcyMi04YjI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eR0Zp0yuQ7CG10_tijjwCxAGaAK6-HcYvmVnnstG448=)

The president and I are so grateful to have such dedicated, progressive fighters on our team. Thank you.
There's work to be done!

– Chrissy

Devon, PA 19333

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: re: House Democrats’ amazing accomplishments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458

name: Urgent Message (via DLCC.org)
subject: Can you help us fight extremism in your state?
body:
Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | |
---
| | **The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda in state after state.** But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4qddGzkDS9Qiz_hwVI5f6vSa2c5KSjw_M6gWInhYY4R9kNIRwrZ-HS2iX0XRBBo2KevVqUXkvBKIusprmh14CFTQ2ugvpTWpnzNNbx0djQVysF6zr3gAm29A4zfRWoCbabRMQbuIUbfMiKsd3sszPbl6zogUm5RJaHN0O54QdDITp5rKGtLHMJjynEDbot7zfBduGK3mlRkwML2Isx5iv6jDU9gNUblUzehFjYzlej6gQ_v8uTP_i58-u-gLK-fkFbqpufOld8aqB3OKESFSk-FxApuw3vHKT4ZDVnP_zjqlD0GUY9JdWD_iF1OXxZVZ5kgOAlvl9dG9sBTjf5ptwxkFJif40Tpf_a9RK7JVoqLjvbjDsLIlpEZPTJVyRTvvZm6X_RVmAf-0kMvBAL5-ya-dTFUSmZI-LLnJpmtHIfh9GhVLhgQCUYM2xBg5zcuTAGc3JHMwc4HC5Q2zRhbrSrHg0UzjMtqZp8Ui9yhsdcEpko3jJIPWFYgCZso9di8WMEjS1q6WfUdibeVVcz9U8_ww_F8b72PVNNXhsx77P14ldHgvcZV4IQFNBG-9k8lOED3o_tLBjZ7OD9IGN01EY9kzhS8DuQGHmM0c-CNAyXU_259KXdEWqbmhcRvotq8ftSs7EliWBDehKDX7VeIGL2E/3y4/7ATuCLYAThC9yPKY033GQw/h0/rALktOUf3q59ZGEYtbIENnMFkeQnNwhFwRZYdt5GkDE) Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. clean_body: Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | | | | The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda in state after state. But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. That’s why they’re calling on members of this community – yes, you! – to help fight Republican extremism across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | GOP lawmakers have already started to propose dangerous legislation like: The death penalty for women who have abortions Infringing on LGBTQ+ rights Enacting execution by firing squad And so much more! name: Team Schiff
subject: Derek, will you appear in one of our campaign ads?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Your voice matters to Adam and our campaign. If we’re going to build the largest grassroots campaign in the history of California — and we will — then Adam is going to need supporters like you at the forefront of our movement.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3041%2E5257348%2Ep3tugA)
Hey Derek — will you tell us why _you_ want Adam to be a U.S. Senator?
We are SO appreciative of every grassroots supporter helping Adam in this Senate race. The campaign is truly about all of us – and that includes you.
And after you helped us reach our FEC fundraising goal, **we wanted to hear more about why you’re supporting this campaign.**
So here’s how it works:
1. Click the link below and select a question — that will be the topic of the video you record.
2. Record your video.
3. Then, upload your video. That’s it!

**[Will you record a video for our campaign sharing why you support Adam? All you need is a cell phone or laptop — and we may even use your video in future campaign ads!](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2494?t=4&akid=3041%2E5257348%2Ep3tugA)**
[SUBMIT YOUR VIDEO](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2494?t=5&akid=3041%2E5257348%2Ep3tugA)
---
Your voice matters to Adam and our campaign. If we’re going to build the largest grassroots campaign in the history of California — and we will — then Adam is going to need supporters like you at the forefront of our movement.
**[So take the next step as one of Adam’s top grassroots supporters today and share your story of why you’re supporting his campaign.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2494?t=6&akid=3041%2E5257348%2Ep3tugA)**
Thanks again for your support — our campaign wouldn’t be the same without you.
— Team Schiff

name: John Fetterman
subject: Let’s talk about Judge Timika Lane
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
PA superior court elections are this year!
#
Derek,
There are important PA elections this year -- so I wanted to make sure you heard about Judge Timika Lane.
Judge Lane is running for Superior Court, and PA deserves an experienced judge who will fairly apply the law and protect our rights. **She’s followed a path from public school teacher, to child advocate, to experienced attorney, and now a very qualified judge.** In fact, she’s the only judge in the race for Superior Court who’s “highly recommended” by the Pennsylvania Bar Association.
**[Can you rush in a donation of any amount to help Judge Lane today?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49724?t=1&akid=8474%2E434096%2EbSXaf1)**
**[Donate »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49724?t=2&akid=8474%2E434096%2EbSXaf1)**
This team made huge waves when we flipped PA blue last year 🔵 so let’s keep that momentum up and down the ballot.
Thanks, Derek!! Have a great rest of your weekend.
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230723-8474-footer&t=3&refcode2=8474_434096_bSXaf1&akid=8474%2E434096%2EbSXaf1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=8474%2E434096%2EbSXaf1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8474%2E434096%2EbSXaf1)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

**One of my opponents, Adam Schiff, just outraised me by a long shot last quarter — and we need to make up ground _fast._**
