Here’s the sad truth: Black women candidates on average raise just one-third as much money as white women (and even less compared to white men) — a metric that has become painfully clear in the fundraising deficit in this race. And, while Black women candidates put our campaign contributions to work as efficiently as possible, there's only so many miracles that we can pull off.

Friend, there is only one reason why a Black woman with decades of progressive experience in politics would lose this primary: Money.

Because I have proven time and time again, in more ways that I can count, that I will never waver in my fight for progress. Even if it means standing alone as the sole dissenting vote against what I know is wrong, I will always use my voice to defend those who have been voiceless for far too long.

But I'm not naïve, friend. I know that if I don't have the money to compete in this race, I can't win — and I know that as a Black woman, fundraising will always be harder for me. But that doesn't mean that we should give up. Because with zero Black women senators serving right now, I know my voice is sorely needed in the Senate.

**But to get to the finish line in this race, it's absolutely critical that I reach my emergency fundraising goal before midnight tonight.**

So I'm turning to my supporters in this difficult moment to ask: [Will you rush $10 or more — anything you can spare — to help me reach my emergency goal before midnight and help me speak out for progressive values in the Senate?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAnWMeGQRTWwg9hmIWTfqeDzOaUkg2xHb5RXAB52CeRAkPpvMaIs6P1d7MK59TmekeVLSwAXMOF5gFoFXzwTo1oYgMMHt02stW2b7_ECFkuWT-_P_oBlsYd1Mi3A0iCxFv2FQYvHdHsN8xhwtZksx-uUjZxgiIuc_qDD6OQcb4NvsjR9P7jLzxXOohXtJpBB3uzi_234B-DG0lqNx4PaGu_Db5vFi3WBjEtmsDHUPDzA2Yy25Rky9qlzVgCvmBiKAybtFEFLQZblK8UN5mZC_0fIM5aUsAG8Kpp3D8qGAcFkm9XAex_Fqogz99jgxJ554V4LAYkU-6yWH7Bbcc2R661eJL9_gFNrrOy4pGNrMRoVyq_1uidhJUAu2og7aavrVp/3y4/zXn41OE0TymYDtk6482pEg/h4/nSH0WHcSEfcWD3zxz6AgyED1Mc2r85kEbFG-x3huhns)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, I have some bad news to share: One of my opponents, Adam Schiff, just outraised me by a long shot last quarter — and we need to make up ground fast. This is a make-or-break moment for me, Peter, and I still need to raise $18,960 to reach my emergency goal before midnight tonight. | Here’s the sad truth: Black women candidates on average raise just one-third as much money as white women (and even less compared to white men) — a metric that has become painfully clear in the fundraising deficit in this race. And, while Black women candidates put our campaign contributions to work as efficiently as possible, there's only so many miracles that we can pull off. Friend, there is only one reason why a Black woman with decades of progressive experience in politics would lose this primary: Money. Because I have proven time and time again, in more ways that I can count, that I will never waver in my fight for progress. Even if it means standing alone as the sole dissenting vote against what I know is wrong, I will always use my voice to defend those who have been voiceless for far too long. But I'm not naïve, friend. I know that if I don't have the money to compete in this race, I can't win — and I know that as a Black woman, fundraising will always be harder for me. But that doesn't mean that we should give up. Because with zero Black women senators serving right now, I know my voice is sorely needed in the Senate. But to get to the finish line in this race, it's absolutely critical that I reach my emergency fundraising goal before midnight tonight. So I'm turning to my supporters in this difficult moment to ask: If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | I'm so grateful for your support. Thank you for coming through when it matters most. — Barbara Lee The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: POLL ALERT (via Team Salazar)
subject: Do you still believe in the American Dream?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | As a first-generation American, Maria Elvira Salazar grew up hearing the stories of her family’s experience under Castro’s COMMUNIST Cuba. You weren’t allowed to own a business, put food on the table, or even speak your mind without permission and oversight of the state. Millions of people who immigrated to the United States come from a similar story. And they thrived here because they believed in the American Dream. We’re hoping that most Americans still support the American Dream and would reject the Socialist nightmare offered by the left. We would really like to hear your response. **[Do you still believe in the American Dream, or do you support socialism?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=15964aeeaec7420d959993632512d3ea&_e=fkMT7m8lpOuwv4kS79FFNrnpMut7skPaq5wwkNLxcVy0T0BGZFg_SP5KhtZgGYbluiynpSGR5UAFqZhohz1rXltkPJnQzs4gaVNhzlwP97jVDNb7v0hb2NQbgb44His7BUfSWZcHiH8mKdX-qffbVKSowYHY1jfOWdq6EbvMHJmPNOniPXk6xOcpGKpiqs2KjpqHmI9MHKp7w_K3flcWmNIALpA2RWIbii7pbwBdvqKM30oD1jSMwKurCsjPZg04FIMX8U4DCZyqXVAV-FCrlryzKAQ3yQxM3MY8ZQ0B4KeLoy4SnnyzSca2t1N4ChBPW1zv3iHOAex469Y6qOfrLGnD2TyG0yKzo3iX7Pa1uqEGSoa1ypbXRKQHGljY3sIyTtr8CyGZTNjWet_8yWv73w%3D%3D)**

name: Justin Pitts
subject: Our list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
to win

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66940269/418067861/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTc5MjdkOS05ODI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_Qx_b9bM1ZK8eU7QqLGS3CIVCcx-4IC72fnfb8PsLQ=&emci=2b3d5238-9829-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=a97927d9-9829-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=43566853)

| | Hey y’all,

I put together a quick list of what we need in order to win in Georgia in 2024. This isn’t an exhaustive list by any means, but I wanted to give you a look into what kinds of things we’re planning and what we need to do to win.
* Organizers in every county across the state
* A top-notch traditional and digital communications program
* A leadership institute that will train our candidates on how to run winning campaigns
* The best voter protection team in the entire country
* A statewide network of grassroots volunteers
* A nationwide network of grassroots donors who believe in the importance of Georgia

In 2020, Joe Biden won Georgia by less than 12,000 votes – just 0.23% of the votes cast. In electoral politics, we call that a “field margin.”

And the way we win by a field margin is by out-organizing our GOP opponents – by meeting voters where they’re at, recruiting thousands of volunteers who organize their local communities, by knocking on doors, making phone calls, and sending texts.

So we need to start building our field network _**all_** across Georgia. We need to hire organizers in critical Democratic counties to make sure our turnout remains high. We need organizers in GOP counties to make sure that the Democrats there **_also_** turn out to vote. And we need organizers in swing counties like Baldwin and Washington counties.

[**_But we also need your help to fund these organizers. A field team like the one we’re going to need takes a lot of resources, and we can only sustain it with support from our grassroots team. Can we count on your support?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66940270/418067862/710125701?refcode=20230723.1_JP_7AA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTc5MjdkOS05ODI5LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_Qx_b9bM1ZK8eU7QqLGS3CIVCcx-4IC72fnfb8PsLQ=)_

If you’re with us, if you believe Georgia is going to decide the 2024 election, and if you understand that we need your support to build the program we need, then I’m asking for you to pitch in whatever you can afford right now.

Thank you,

Justin

Justin Pitts
Deputy Executive Director
Democratic Party of Georgia
---
|
---

| Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org
---

| Democratic Party of Georgia
P.O. BOX 89202
Atlanta, GA 30312
United States

| Communicating with our supporters is critical to the Democratic Party of Georgia’s continued success, and email is one of the best tools we have to do it. However, If you wish to unsubscribe you can do so [here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=Q7u25%2B%2FZj%2BwlhJxc0cIxaRSQ9WGKGKZusJ2r7fqDRj7BydCiZDGS%2FAwzZNHANYNsLMIM%2Bc5J%2Bc4EUMoGfBSM6czPzgkULMIFD%2FfeDci2RQiZI96%2BpARglJRWMEQf55ScqSLE5Vh8vNb2Hk4%2Bg%2BtEalhJtx9sJL44NmhK%2BDb2iF2YZEc0b6Sb%2F9vRvkUuRit9GZj%2BFRNzQhDs%2F9qwzIqoazZSQTaYXoq%2B0PHYlW2g3fKXcOfJHbvR6uqFLfQMzmsu40XE6RTGjPNMQ7FbrVAsMi3Js9CGot4fK9SAKkSyFnMLjJFGuDbe9jh8tsBQaPIDB2Lc8g0g1yxXMiB5aFTdQgnVZIF%2FKZOc9phZqvi7VxzaL%2F0tfLRAkiJyhEX0z%2Fvmx9mlrYKw%2Bq1WxpPNb%2BbE9ertdXJTcHHHRCCIGZiF8gLd3%2F4lOtO7hEI35h6vgDC0).

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Gun safety is a winning issue
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The American people want to see gun safety legislation. The only place where it’s controversial is in Congress.
#

Team -
When GIFFORDS was founded ten years ago, it was taboo for candidates to talk about gun safety. The issue was deemed by many as too divisive. But now, gun safety is a winning issue.
The American people want to see gun safety legislation passed into law. The only place where it’s controversial is in Congress. We have a U.S. House where extreme members of the Republican party are more concerned with keeping special interests like the gun lobby happy than of protecting their constituents.
We need to tell these extreme politicians that we’ll never back down in the fight to keep our communities safe. The best way we can do that is by putting up strong numbers at each and every one of our monthly fundraising deadlines.
[**So please, with just about a week left until our July fundraising drive comes to a close, will you make a contribution of $3 to GIFFORDS PAC?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230723-1-30&t=1&akid=6183%2E3935704%2EAysaEL)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Stop child trafficking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, It’s absolutely abhorrent - **60% of all children who set out to cross the border have been caught by cartels and are being abused in human trafficking.**

_Wide open borders entice and invite traffickers to come right in. It’s disgusting - and the Left refuses to do anything about it._

There’s only one way to stop trafficking in America: secure our border and hold cartels and criminals accountable.

**[Join me today to SECURE OUR BORDER and bring this humanitarian crisis to an end.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=bf410db264c843f58479668e57882a32&_e=P8bVVznfmwyNLs1ac4y-_APYFBW-Emu_uNrasa_VEVRJqv8kY3qJRyXi87T1KSzwltK8DBN-0-ym6OmpP0T2EXQMkOhXuJ9_vVruw16Q2Yr8VhlFVXtBuBAVyDv43sKMtffp3Lyb_sZWd-1iWayLdlQW0QYl9ylXvftNfl9D_CV3EqdjVPwfsJn-TuSOIrsnfeI9jtLe4JhNqwu3hzWxO95bGAMoHv6qO5VHOqRRRpuuRCHybvnPlD7sp_Q7NCXObSkg9tFT8b4Idxm6LOzFq7dT2snjMGVRH94Kidz3Q0XEO2S2s-tYbl2dZSra7_2q_O2eDjBZLPwJpLmN2ivkR-Bx_DU7Pn92LqrFhDY4Z9qzCb-fjS-6ZvdPh0RcWAVXtT6ctSIxGsFe-HkH7Zu_HkYFZxnAKXRCvc-bkKTy0jsJyjlfShFv6RZF5YLFZ2n6)**

_It’s almost like he’s purposefully ignoring the border because he knows conservatives are right about the tragedy going on there._ Combating human trafficking should be a bipartisan issue, but instead, the Left has chosen to ignore it under the guise of open borders. **I will ALWAYS stand for the innocent children at the mercy of cartels and smugglers, and I know you will too.** **[Please, join our team today to SECURE OUR BORDER and stop human trafficking.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=bf410db264c843f58479668e57882a32&_e=P8bVVznfmwyNLs1ac4y-_APYFBW-Emu_uNrasa_VEVRJqv8kY3qJRyXi87T1KSzwltK8DBN-0-ym6OmpP0T2EXQMkOhXuJ9_vVruw16Q2Yr8VhlFVXtBuBAVyDv43sKMtffp3Lyb_sZWd-1iWayLdlQW0QYl9ylXvftNfl9D_CV3EqdjVPwfsJn-TuSOIrsnfeI9jtLe4JhNqwu3hzWxO95bGAMoHv6qO5VHOqRRRpuuRCHybvnPlD7sp_Q7NCXObSkg9tFT8b4Idxm6LOzFq7dT2snjMGVRH94Kidz3Q0VfVg0XQRfKjj6FVCIo2p1GZ6lPNi2JqrnSvAEGv0PNkULx-CHBUJ2cbTxW6_tPuupKStNPfLWanLv3Eu8A-hkII8ElLsJ2hYG-T464KwGoItfSTeQfCJtV2uVkT6HXo-jAxlLRt_8IvbYZ28SiVg0h)**

name: Al Franken
subject: a big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50020?t=6&akid=9369%2E878179%2E7UOHDq) Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[**I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Voter Protection Project and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50020?t=7&akid=9369%2E878179%2E7UOHDq)

Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them._**

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation.

[**So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50020?t=8&akid=9369%2E878179%2E7UOHDq) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50021?t=9&akid=9369%2E878179%2E7UOHDq)

Kirsten is working hard in Congress to deliver results for your family. There are so many issues that our team is focused on right now: Legislation to guarantee paid family leave to all workers, a resolution to add the Equal Rights Amendment to the Constitution, reforms to crack down on dangerous "ghost guns" and more.
But during those rare moments away from her work in the Senate, Kirsten is laser-focused on building a winning grassroots campaign.**After flipping so many House seats red last year, New York Republicans think that they have the momentum advantage here._It's up to us to prove them wrong._**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. name: Alaskans For Honest Elections
subject: “By Alaskans, For Alaskans” Important RCV Message!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | [](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64bd96765a9f156aecc250fe&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D64bd95090514104999fac1e9%26ss_email_id%3D64bd96765a9f156aecc250fe%26ss_campaign_name%3D%25E2%2580%259CBy%2BAlaskans%252C%2BFor%2BAlaskans%25E2%2580%259D%2BImportant%2BRCV%2BMessage%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-07-23T21%253A07%253A47Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64bd95090514104999fac1e9&l=en-US&s=8IWZPSLxorBAZedL1IR5lEY8GRs%3D)
---
|
### **Message To Alaskans**
---
#### **Alaskans & Americans Today**
We stand against the multi-millionaire and billionaire backed Pro-RCV groups!!! Just as history reveals the arrogance of the Japanese Empire during WWII. The ignorance and arrogance to overlook obvious flaws in their designs and plans is astounding. Like the formidable battleships of the past, they seemed invincible, but they underestimated the power of determined and brave Americans! Let their arrogance be their downfall, as we charge forward, undeterred by the obstacles in our path! The Yamato's last voyage teaches us a valuable lesson: even the mightiest can fall with the right strategy and determination! These multi-millionaire backed Pro-RCV groups remind me of the arrogance of the Japanese Empire during WWII, both the Germans and Japanese built the most powerful battleships ever built. Yet they did not think about all the potential issues like air bombardment, which ultimately took down the Yamato. Yamato 's Last Voyage. On her last morning, before the first American planes intercepted her, Yamato would have appeared indestructible. After all, she was the heaviest and most powerful battleship ever built, carrying the most formidable guns ever mounted at sea. Yet a small and determined force took down the mighty Yamato. The U.S. did not need a super powerful battleship, just some great pilots. Alaskans, this is our time to shine! Take up your pens and sign the petition to repeal ranked choice voting! Let's prove that when Alaskans stand, we are an unstoppable force!
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### **Celebrating Alaskan Spirit!**
In the land of the midnight sun, where resilience and determination flow like the mighty rivers, Alaskans have achieved a monumental triumph in their pursuit of our Constitutional Republic. With the image of fishing for salmon and collecting signatures, we witness the true essence of Alaskan identity interwoven with the spirit of determination and helping each other. Through grit and unity, Alaskans have cast their nets wide, embracing the challenge of repealing ranked choice voting. Like the seasoned fishermen, they navigated the turbulent waters of politics, standing shoulder to shoulder, forging a path towards a more transparent electoral system. Just as the salmon fight against the current to help further their generations, Alaskans faced their own obstacles, but their unyielding resolve made them unstoppable. They understand that their voices matter, and their votes are a vital part of shaping Alaska's future. The act of collecting signatures not only reflects their commitment to preserving their values but also epitomizes the inclusivity and diversity that define Alaskan culture. In this endeavor, Alaskans have showcased their unity, bridging gaps, and fostering a strong sense of community that exemplifies the Alaskan way. Today, we applaud the Alaskans' triumph, as they have demonstrated that together, anything is possible. Let us take inspiration from their journey, embracing the challenges that lie ahead with an unwavering spirit, knowing that collective action can bring about profound change. May this victory serve as a beacon of hope and inspiration to all, reminding us that in the face of adversity, the spirit of Alaska shines brighter than ever before. Keep pushing forward, empowering change, and together, let's make our voices heard!
---
### **Our Office is Now Open, Soon We will be Open 7 Days a Week. At this time, please call before you head this way to make sure we have someone here to get your signature.**
**Address: 4201 E Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654****It is on the same road as Ken’s Garden Supply (**_**4121 Dimond Way, Wasilla, AK 99654). Once you turn on Dimond, drive straight up the hill. Do not turn, go straight up the hill, there are White Yard Signs with our logo on them. We will have bigger signs coming soon. If you are disabled, please let us know when you call and we will come to the car for you to sign.**__**Phone Number:**[**907-802-8116**](tel:+19078028116)_ _**Email:**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com?subject=Office%20)_
---
#### **You Must Sign The Petition In Person, Online Signatures Do Not Count.**

#### **Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!!
Dan Powell 907-942-1312
Thank You Dan!!!**

**Signature Gathering Update:** Alaskans would like to update Alaska on where we are at in our signature drive. We have collected nearly 20,000 of the required 26,000 signatures so far with more petition books being returned every day. We have 1,000 Petition Books in circulation if all filled out is 150,000 signatures. We have had such incredible success; we have asked all our Alaskan Volunteers to return their books 6 months early. Join today to help us Repeal Ranked Choice Voting, help us get our signatures finished as soon as possible. **Supreme Court Decision – Al Gross Should have stayed on the US House Ballot** Very concerning development at the Supreme Court regarding Al Gross dropping out of Special Primary in 2022, it appears that the division of elections violated State Law when they removed Al Gross from the ballot. If he was not removed it would have be Begich, Palin, Gross, Peltola on the ballot, which may have had a very different result. We are very troubled by this development and hope all Alaskans take the time to learn more about this Supreme Court ruling.
#### “Al Gross should have stayed on U.S. House ballot, Alaska Supreme Court says Justices concluded that the Alaska Division of Elections mishandled the withdrawal of the independent who sought to replace Don Young”
“The Alaska Division of Elections improperly removed Al Gross, an independent candidate for U.S. House, from last year’s special election ballot, the Alaska Supreme Court said in a ruling published Friday.”BY: [JAMES BROOKS](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64bd96765a9f156aecc250fe&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2Fauthor%2Fjames-brooks%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64bd95090514104999fac1e9&l=en-US&s=al-hZN1JTrduBcuQPW7VoaTf3NU%3D "Posts by James Brooks") \- APRIL 28, 2023 5:48 PM Alaska Beacon [https://alaskabeacon.com/2023/04/28/al-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says/](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64bd96765a9f156aecc250fe&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2F2023%2F04%2F28%2Fal-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64bd95090514104999fac1e9&l=en-US&s=QAToQRPJehpj-LgVxrz9wpotGso%3D) **Our work used to ban Ranked Choice Voting** We have been working hard with other States to help them learn about Ranked Choice Voting, why it is not a good system and how it does not achieve the goals it sets out to accomplish. Our work is being credited by multiple State Legislatures. We are proud to be a part of the work throughout the country to ban Ranked Choice Voting. More States have banned Rank Choice Voting, than use it (5-2)**Florida, Tennessee, Idaho, South Dakota, and Montana have banned ranked Choice Voting, more states are looking at banning ranked choice Voting.**

clean_body: Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | | Message To Alaskans Alaskans & Americans Today We stand against the multi-millionaire and billionaire backed Pro-RCV groups!!! Just as history reveals the arrogance of the Japanese Empire during WWII. The ignorance and arrogance to overlook obvious flaws in their designs and plans is astounding. Like the formidable battleships of the past, they seemed invincible, but they underestimated the power of determined and brave Americans! Let their arrogance be their downfall, as we charge forward, undeterred by the obstacles in our path! The Yamato's last voyage teaches us a valuable lesson: even the mightiest can fall with the right strategy and determination! These multi-millionaire backed Pro-RCV groups remind me of the arrogance of the Japanese Empire during WWII, both the Germans and Japanese built the most powerful battleships ever built. Yet they did not think about all the potential issues like air bombardment, which ultimately took down the Yamato. Yamato 's Last Voyage. On her last morning, before the first American planes intercepted her, Yamato would have appeared indestructible. After all, she was the heaviest and most powerful battleship ever built, carrying the most formidable guns ever mounted at sea. Yet a small and determined force took down the mighty Yamato. The U.S. did not need a super powerful battleship, just some great pilots. Alaskans, this is our time to shine! Take up your pens and sign the petition to repeal ranked choice voting! Let's prove that when Alaskans stand, we are an unstoppable force! | | Celebrating Alaskan Spirit! In the land of the midnight sun, where resilience and determination flow like the mighty rivers, Alaskans have achieved a monumental triumph in their pursuit of our Constitutional Republic. With the image of fishing for salmon and collecting signatures, we witness the true essence of Alaskan identity interwoven with the spirit of determination and helping each other. Through grit and unity, Alaskans have cast their nets wide, embracing the challenge of repealing ranked choice voting. Like the seasoned fishermen, they navigated the turbulent waters of politics, standing shoulder to shoulder, forging a path towards a more transparent electoral system. Just as the salmon fight against the current to help further their generations, Alaskans faced their own obstacles, but their unyielding resolve made them unstoppable. They understand that their voices matter, and their votes are a vital part of shaping Alaska's future. The act of collecting signatures not only reflects their commitment to preserving their values but also epitomizes the inclusivity and diversity that define Alaskan culture. In this endeavor, Alaskans have showcased their unity, bridging gaps, and fostering a strong sense of community that exemplifies the Alaskan way. Today, we applaud the Alaskans' triumph, as they have demonstrated that together, anything is possible. Let us take inspiration from their journey, embracing the challenges that lie ahead with an unwavering spirit, knowing that collective action can bring about profound change. May this victory serve as a beacon of hope and inspiration to all, reminding us that in the face of adversity, the spirit of Alaska shines brighter than ever before. Keep pushing forward, empowering change, and together, let's make our voices heard! Our Office is Now Open, Soon We will be Open 7 Days a Week. At this time, please call before you head this way to make sure we have someone here to get your signature. Address: 4201 E Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654It is on the same road as Ken’s Garden Supply (4121 Dimond Way, Wasilla, AK 99654). Once you turn on Dimond, drive straight up the hill. Do not turn, go straight up the hill, there are White Yard Signs with our logo on them. We will have bigger signs coming soon. If you are disabled, please let us know when you call and we will come to the car for you to sign.Phone Number:tel:+19078028116 Email:mailto:Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com?subject=Office%20 You Must Sign The Petition In Person, Online Signatures Do Not Count. | | Signing Locations | | | Anchorage Sign During Business Hours | Kenai / Soldotna Sign at G F Sherman Signs | Sign In Juneau, Call Beforehand | Sign In Wasilla, Address and Times Below | Sign In Homer, address and time below | Wasilla Sign During Business Hours | Eagle River, Sign at the Republican Party table at Bear Paw. | Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!! Dan Powell 907-942-1312 Thank You Dan!!! | | Signature Gathering Update: Alaskans would like to update Alaska on where we are at in our signature drive. We have collected nearly 20,000 of the required 26,000 signatures so far with more petition books being returned every day. We have 1,000 Petition Books in circulation if all filled out is 150,000 signatures. We have had such incredible success; we have asked all our Alaskan Volunteers to return their books 6 months early. Join today to help us Repeal Ranked Choice Voting, help us get our signatures finished as soon as possible. Supreme Court Decision – Al Gross Should have stayed on the US House Ballot Very concerning development at the Supreme Court regarding Al Gross dropping out of Special Primary in 2022, it appears that the division of elections violated State Law when they removed Al Gross from the ballot. If he was not removed it would have be Begich, Palin, Gross, Peltola on the ballot, which may have had a very different result. We are very troubled by this development and hope all Alaskans take the time to learn more about this Supreme Court ruling. “Al Gross should have stayed on U.S. House ballot, Alaska Supreme Court says Justices concluded that the Alaska Division of Elections mishandled the withdrawal of the independent who sought to replace Don Young” “The Alaska Division of Elections improperly removed Al Gross, an independent candidate for U.S. House, from last year’s special election ballot, the Alaska Supreme Court said in a ruling published Friday.”BY: "Posts by James Brooks" \- APRIL 28, 2023 5:48 PM Alaska Beacon Our work used to ban Ranked Choice Voting We have been working hard with other States to help them learn about Ranked Choice Voting, why it is not a good system and how it does not achieve the goals it sets out to accomplish. subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Save baby polar bears from Big Oil’s drilling
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891737?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | You’re a fluffy baby polar bear, getting ready to cozy up to your mama for sleep — safe and warm in the comfort of your den, hidden far below the ice’s surface. As a newborn, you’re too weak to survive on your own in the scary, big world. On the outside, your Arctic habitat is warming twice as fast as the rest of the Earth, and every patch of glacial land that hasn’t melted away is precious. But as you drift off to sleep in your mama’s embrace, the ground begins to shake. It’s getting heavier and more aggressive. **The quaking intensifies.** Loud whirring sounds roar through the den as you shiver in fear. Even mama bear seems distressed, **crying out in defense** , but you can’t even hear her roaring through the noise. Before you know it, the den ceiling begins to crack and the walls begin to **crash and crumble.** Suddenly, a **GIANT METAL MASS** bulldozes through, **collapsing your shelter** — and **RUNNING OVER AND KILLING** your tiny cub siblings as it barrels towards you. _**Then everything goes black.**_ What was that large industrial-size device that completely crushed these harmless polar bear cubs to death? _**It was a massive oil drilling machine!**_ **Friend, the increase in Arctic fossil fuel activity is threatening endangered polar bears, and we MUST take action now.[Will you help defend helpless polar bears today by signing our petition now to STOP Big Oil drilling and fracking in the Arctic? Add your name now >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891738?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891739?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, polar bears are already suffering the worst impacts of human-driven climate change as their sensitive Arctic habitat is melting _**TWICE as fast**_ as the rest of the world. And when Big Oil charges through, it brings **toxic pollutants** into the region and releases**harmful greenhouse gas emissions** that speed up the ice melting — threatening polar survival even further.
While federal laws require Big Oil to avoid _**known**_ polar bear denning sites by at least a mile when drilling in the Arctic, recent studies show **significant flaws in the accuracy** of the current technology used to detect these polar bear shelters deep beneath the ice. And as you read in our story above, failure to correctly identify the dens before fossil fuel extraction means _**DANGER**_ for nursing polar bear mamas and their cubs. The massive drilling equipment can not only _run over and crush_ these polar bears to death, but it can even _**bury these poor animals alive!**_
Now, the Biden administration has caved to pressure from Big Oil by signing a new rule permitting increased oil and gas activity in the Arctic. The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service (FWS) has confirmed a **95% probability** that the new rule will result in _**“SERIOUS INJURY OR DEATH”**_ to endangered Southern Beaufort polar bears, the most imperiled polar bears in the WORLD.
If we’re going to save these polar bears and protect the Arctic from fossil fuel greed, we need**_2,893 more_** activist signatures _**by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT**_ to pressure FWS into _**REJECTING increased oil drilling and fracking in the Arctic.**_ [**Can these beloved animals count on you to be their voice today, Friend? Add your name now to protect polar bears from Big Oil’s corporate greed before it’s too late >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891740?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1891739?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Fossil Fuel and Lands Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: NDRC News Alert
subject: First: Alabama. Then: Louisiana. Next:❓
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, last month the Supreme Court upheld the Voting Rights Act and affirmed a district court opinion that struck down Alabama’s congressional map for illegally diluting the power of Black voters.

**It was a HUGE victory for our grassroots movement – and A.G. Eric Holder predicted the decision would “have an impact far beyond the borders of Alabama.” _That prediction is already coming true._** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66940978/418070655/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230723_FR_7Q_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkZDE2NGZlLTlkMjktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LlE0IIx5-vmz5fu9RCs5RGLIh6W0nRzcJSp3S4zJfxg=)

[**_Donate to help the NDRC keep fighting for fairness nationwide >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66940979/418070656/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230723_FR_7Q_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkZDE2NGZlLTlkMjktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LlE0IIx5-vmz5fu9RCs5RGLIh6W0nRzcJSp3S4zJfxg=)
The Supreme Court has already paved the way for Louisiana to redraw its congressional map – and pending litigation in states like Georgia and Florida could lead to similar outcomes.

That means we have an **opportunity** to secure a level playing field in 2024 by defeating gerrymandered maps in states all across the country.

But our **challenge** is that Republicans are still going to do _everything they can_ to keep their gerrymandered maps in place. If left unchecked, GOP lawmakers could obstruct, stall, and drag their feet to avoid having to redraw their manipulated maps before 2024.
[**_That’s why it’s _critical_ for the NDRC to continue working across the country to protect our fair maps victories, prevent GOP gerrymandering, and propel fair redistricting. Will you rush a donation now to help support our efforts?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66940980/418070657/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230723_FR_7Q_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkZDE2NGZlLTlkMjktZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LlE0IIx5-vmz5fu9RCs5RGLIh6W0nRzcJSp3S4zJfxg=)

clean_body: | Team, last month the Supreme Court upheld the Voting Rights Act and affirmed a district court opinion that struck down Alabama’s congressional map for illegally diluting the power of Black voters. It was a HUGE victory for our grassroots movement – and A.G. Eric Holder predicted the decision would “have an impact far beyond the borders of Alabama.” That prediction is already coming true. | = = The Supreme Court has already paved the way for Louisiana to redraw its congressional map – and pending litigation in states like Georgia and Florida could lead to similar outcomes. That means we have an opportunity to secure a level playing field in 2024 by defeating gerrymandered maps in states all across the country. But our challenge is that Republicans are still going to do everything they can to keep their gerrymandered maps in place. If left unchecked, GOP lawmakers could obstruct, stall, and drag their feet to avoid having to redraw their manipulated maps before 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

They're trying to silence all conservative voices. We WON 'T stand for this. \-- JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -| | | Friend,

---
Former Speaker Newt Gingrich made a big statement on _Fox Business:_

---
_**“Right now the numbers are so overwhelming, Republicans ought to start focusing on how to beat Biden because I think at a practical level they have a nominee, and his name is Donald Trump.”
**_
---
_Newt is right! If Republicans ALL came together to unite behind President Trump, we’d have 16 MONTHS 100% dedicated to firing Crooked Joe! We’d be _unstoppable_._

---
But sadly, special interest disloyal Republican donors – known as RINOs – are working on a **$370 MILLION PLOT** to try and install a puppet GOP nominee in President Trump’s place who will appease the Deep State.

---
**That’s why our campaign is filling the void to build that massive operation so that we can be 100% prepared to FIRE Crooked Joe _the second_ President Trump is declared the nominee.**

---
_While the cowards who would stab me in the back have recently been exposed, I do know that I have 74 MILLION courageous allies who refuse to surrender our nation to tyranny._

_Even a contribution of just $1 alongside your fellow patriots is enough to OUTRAISE these RINOs._

If Republicans ALL came together to unite behind President Trump, we’d have 16 MONTHS 100% dedicated to firing Crooked Joe! We’d be unstoppable. But sadly, special interest disloyal Republican donors – known as RINOs – are working on a $370 MILLION PLOT to try and install a puppet GOP nominee in President Trump’s place who will appease the Deep State. Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Republican National Committee, 310 First St. SE, Washington, D.C. 20003.
